Name: CDHorizon United Arab Emirates
Description:
As a subsidiary of Far East Horizon (03360.HK), Horizon Construction Development Limited ("CDHORIZON") is a leading equipment rental company in China, committed to providing one-stop comprehensive solutions of "product+ service" for our clients in the construction and industrial sectors. Established in 2011, ranking the 14th in the IRN 100, CDHORIZON has built up an integrated network of over 580 rental locations cumulatively serving over 320,000 clients in China and overseas.


In 2023, CDHORIZON was listed on the main board of Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited (HKEX), with the stock code 09930.HK. The company makes continuous investment in R&D and innovation. Moreover, it has reached strategic cooperation with a number of leading domestic and international equipment manufacturers, well-known universities and scientific research institutes, possessing hundreds of patents of invention and intellectual property rights, and two of its subsidiaries have been awarded "National High-tech Enterprises”.

Name: Petit Forestier Group
Description:
Because professionals need to conduct their business with complete peace of mind, our mission at Petit Forestier Group is to guarantee operational continuity and simplify the cold chain for our customers. 

We are leaders in refrigerated rental and offer a wide range of vehicles, containers and refrigerated units. Our commitment is to deliver a high-quality, personalised full service and to provide our customers with access to the latest innovations and regulations. It enables all those who place their trust in us to guarantee their cold chain 7/7, 24/24.

Together with our integrated industrial bodybuilder partners, we design tried and tested temperature-controlled solutions to transport and store cold more sustainably. Present in 24 countries (Europe, Africa, the Middle East, the United States and Australia), we have a network of 350 local branches. 

Petit Forestier Group is a family business founded in 1907. We benefit from the expertise and innovation of a Group dedicated to mastering the sustainable cold chain in all its components, from industrial manufacturing to the reconditioning of refrigerated assets for a more sustainable economy.

Name: Whizz
Description: At Whizz, we are on a mission to revolutionize the transportation industry for delivery drivers. We believe that everyone deserves the opportunity to access reliable and convenient mobility solutions, regardless of their financial or credit history. That's why we offer a range of vehicle ownership and financing options that are designed to democratize access and drive success for our customers. Whether a driver is just starting out in the delivery industry or is looking to upgrade their current vehicle, we are here to help them achieve their goals and make their life easier. Our ultimate goal is to make transportation for delivery drivers as seamless and hassle-free as possible, so they can focus on what matters most: delivering top-quality service to their customers.

Name: A GERADORA
Description:
A Geradora leases energy generators, air compressors, lighting towers, lifting platforms and air conditioning equipment. We deliver complete solutions for the Trade & Services, Industry, Construction, Events, Oil & Gas, Mining and Agribusiness segments.

We have a used equipment sales sector, through which we offer machines that are already discontinued from our rental portfolio at a great cost benefit.

Among our clients are Petrobras, Vale, Walmart, Gerdau, Braskem, Rede Globo, Cencosud, JBS, Suzano, Light, Queiroz Galvão, Andrade Mendonça, Camargo Corrêa, Oxiteno, Mendes Júnior, major producers and event agencies, among others.

Name: Groupe KILOUTOU
Description:
4ème loueur européen et acteur majeur de la location de matériel en France, le Groupe Kiloutou apporte des solutions produits et services à une clientèle très diversifiée : grands comptes nationaux, entreprises du BTP, artisans, collectivités et administrations, industries, services, PME, particuliers. 

Le groupe Kiloutou propose la gamme la plus large du marché avec plus de 850 références et environ 200 000 matériels dans des domaines variés : matériels d'élévation de personnels, de terrassement et de construction, gros œuvre et second œuvre, véhicules utilitaires, événementiel et audiovisuel.

En 2013, le groupe KILOUTOU représentait un chiffre d’affaires de 471 millions d'euros réalisé au travers de 433 agences réparties sur tout le territoire, grâce à 3 500 collaborateurs.

Name: Al Faris Group
Description:
We are proud of our expertise in Lifting & Moving Heavy Objects!

Specialist in Heavy Lifting, Heavy Transport and Energy Solutions with the Largest Fleet of Cranes and Heavy Equipment in the Middle East

Founded in 1992, we are a family owned business with over 25+ years of experience in the MENA Region.

With state of the art lifting and transport equipment and through integrated best practices in HSE, we provide – safe, innovative, and reliable solutions for Heavy Lifting & Heavy Transport Solutions.

Our comprehensive network of depots, service engineers, technicians and dedicated teams of professionals are ready to fully serve your needs, using local knowledge and global experience for heavy lifting and heavy transport jobs ranging from regular to extreme. This has enabled us to be a partner of choice for several important and big projects in the region.

The group is devoted to constant improvement, to guarantee our customers Quality, Reliable, and Safe services.

We have played an integral role in the construction of numerous iconic projects such as The Dubai Metro, The Dubai Mall, Dubai International Airport, Riyadh Metro, Palm Jumeirah and The Burj Khalifa, as well as served the largest industries in the region such as the Dubai Dry Docks, Jebel Ali Free Zone, among others which have cemented our position as Industry Leaders and established us as a trusted partner in the region.

We offer our clients turnkey solutions to today’s heavy lifting and abnormal transport challenges including alternative lifting methods with careful planning and delivery. In a region that boasts some of the world’s biggest construction and infrastructure projects, there’s obviously no scarcity of heavy lifting jobs.  Al Faris is aptly equipped to meet this demand.

All equipment need a bit of tender loving care, and we are all about giving them all the care we can. And to do this, we have a brand-new, state-of-the-art facility in Dubai with qualified technicians working to International standards for service and maintenance.

Name: Power House
Description:
Power House is a leading, ISO-certified service company in the fields of power generation, pumping, gas and air compression. Founded in 1992 and headquartered in Cairo, Power House has now expanded to employ more than 400 highly-qualified engineers, technicians and staff and actually holds and operates a highly diverse fleet of electric generators, pumps, compressors and solar panels all across Egypt. The company endeavors and successfully achieves tailored time- and cost-effective power generation and pumping solutions to its customers serving in various industries including the oil and gas, mining, construction, tourism and telecom. Power House strives to earn highest customer satisfaction and trust by proposing full packages ranging from Study, Assessment, design and Engineering, Installation, start-up, operation and maintenance.
The company is also the sole authorized dealer for Sullair air compressors in Egypt in the oil and gas fields and a Siemens authorized type-tested electric panel builder.

Name: Loxam Brasil
Description:
O Grupo Loxam é uma empresa especializada em aluguel de máquinas e equipamentos para construção civil, indústria, varejo e eventos. No Brasil, possui as marcas Loxam Degraus e Loxam Motormac Rental.

Temos em nosso catálogo mais de 150 opções de máquinas e equipamentos para locação com disponibilidade imediata, atendendo a todo o território nacional.
Location: São José dos Campos , São Paulo

Name: Arabian Consolidated Trading Group
Description:
ACT Group was established in Jubail, Saudi Arabia, in 1983, becoming one of the leading companies in heavy equipment rental, stationary equipment, and logistics services. Over the past four decades, we have built a strong reputation by providing innovative and reliable solutions that meet our clients' diverse needs.

We offer a comprehensive range of services, including:

     - 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐯𝐲 𝐄𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐩𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐑𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐥: We provide a wide array of heavy equipment such as cranes, boom trucks, forklifts, telehandlers, and heavy transportation services, enabling our clients to execute their projects efficiently.
     - 𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐲 𝐄𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐩𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭: We offer high-quality stationary equipment, including diesel generators, air compressors, tower lights, and welding machines, to meet various industry requirements, ensuring operational continuity and effectiveness.
      - 𝐋𝐨𝐠𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐜𝐬 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐞𝐬: We excel in providing integrated logistics services, including supply chain management, transportation, and equipment relocation, helping our clients achieve their goals efficiently and effectively.

At ACT Group, we are committed to delivering the highest standards of quality and service, continually striving to exceed our clients' expectations through innovation and ongoing development. Join us on our journey towards achieving greater successes in the future.

Name: Cunzolo Guindastes e Plataformas
Description:
Com Certificação ISO 9001, a Cunzolo atua desde 1967 oferecendo soluções de qualidade para içamentos, trabalho em altura e movimentação de cargas, através de operações eficazes e seguras, de profissionais capacitados, de equipamentos modernos e bem mantidos, atendendo aos requisitos dos clientes e buscando a excelência das nossas operações. Para isso oferecemos serviços de locação de movimentação de cargas através da locação de guindastes, empilhadeiras e acesso em altura através da locação de plataformas de acesso, equipamentos para inspeção de pontes, transporte pesado e remoção industrial.

A Cunzolo investe constantemente em equipamentos de alta qualidade e treinamentos, além de participar de todas as etapas dos processos, desde o planejamento até a execução, a fim garantir a satisfação de seus colaboradores e clientes.

Considerada uma das maiores empresas do setor, a Cunzolo conta com filiais nas cidades de Campinas, São José dos Campos, Sorocaba, Taubaté e Brasília.

A conquista do sucesso é composta por sonhos e expectativas de pessoas que buscam um espaço no mercado, assim deixam como contribuição ao mundo um pouco do que sabem fazer de melhor. Desde 1967 a história da Cunzolo tem muitos capítulos de sucesso, muitos momentos de adversidade e principalmente incontáveis dias de trabalho de uma equipe de colaboradores disposta a fazer da empresa a melhor em seu segmento.

Uma única história de sucesso, sempre aproximando planejamentos e expectativas do crescimento pessoal e profissional das pessoas que formam a empresa.

Assim é a Cunzolo. Grata pelos anos de vida e cheia de novas expectativas para os próximos!

Name: Centurion Group
Description:
Combining our diverse capabilities, scale and expertise to deliver first class results.

Centurion is a global leader in the supply of rentals and services to the critical industries. We combine the scale and breadth of offerings in five key regions: the US; Canada; UK, Europe & Caspian; Middle East & North Africa; and Asia Pacific.

We are experts in delivering equipment, services and managing complex projects safely and competitively in the markets we serve. Centurion is committed to helping our clients and partners achieve their commercial and sustainability goals - from decarbonization to reducing water usage, environmental restoration, and acceleration of renewable energy.

Name: MYCRANE
Description:
MYCRANE is a global online crane rental platform. It was founded to solve the customer procurement challenge of finding the right crane for the right price within the right time frame. 
As a result, MYCRANE offers an easy-to-use, swift, and transparent crane rental solution that connects customers with high-quality rental equipment for their specific needs, regardless of their project and location.

Name: Red-D-Arc
Description:
Red-D-Arc, an Airgas company, rents and leases welders, welding positioners, welding-related equipment, and electric power generators - anywhere in the world. Our rental welders, positioners and specialty products have been engineered and built to provide Extreme-Duty performance and reliability in even the harshest environments, and are available through over 70 Red-D-Arc Service Centers, strategically located throughout the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, France, and the Netherlands, as well as through strategic alliances in the Middle East, Spain, Italy, Croatia, and the Caribbean. From our rental fleet of over 60,000 welders, 3,700 weld positioners, and 3,700 electric-power generators, we can supply you with the equipment you need - where you need it - when you need it.

Airgas, Inc., an Air Liquide company, is one of the leading suppliers of industrial, medical and specialty gases, and hardgoods, such as welding equipment and related products in the United States. Airgas is a leading U.S. producer of atmospheric gases with 17 air separation plants, a leading producer of carbon dioxide, dry ice, and nitrous oxide, one of the largest U.S. suppliers of safety products, and a leading U.S. supplier of refrigerants, ammonia products, and process chemicals. More than 18,000 associates work in over 1,400 locations, including branches, retail stores, gas fill plants, specialty gas labs, production facilities and distribution centers.

Name: Centurion - UK & Europe Region
Description:
Diverse capabilities, scale and expertise to support our customers in achieving their operational goals. 

Centurion offers customers in the critical industries efficient, safety-driven rentals, sales and services. With a strong and established presence in the UK & Europe region, Centurion delivers best-in-class, tailored rental packages to meet customers' precise needs in an efficient and cost-effective manner – no matter the size or scope of the job.

We provide a wide range of equipment, people and technical solutions to customers around the world via six business lines. Our services include key equipment and tooling, critical inspection services, chemical tanks, modular solutions, well testing services, temporary power generation, filtration technology, electric compressors and generators, hydraulic & flushing equipment, subsea technology and tooling services, well services, and more.

We deliver excellence to our customers through our six business lines:

•	Centurion Accommodation & Modular (a combination of legacy brands Conserve and Labtech)

•	Centurion Fluid Filtration (legacy brand Osprey3) 

•	Centurion Flushing & Testing (legacy brand STH)

•	Centurion Power & Equipment (a combination of legacy brands ATR and RentAir)

•	Centurion Pressure Control (legacy brand RMEC)

•	Centurion Subsea Services (legacy brands Aleron and Seanic).

Name: United Rentals Europe
Description:
United Rentals Europe is the industry leader in the European Fluid, Power and Tool solutions market. We provide rental products, customizable rental solutions, and comprehensive tool management services. The equipment we offer is designed with safety and quality as top priorities, featuring “plug and play” capabilities and great versatility for a wide range of applications. We work together with our customers to find solutions with a shared commitment to service and safety. This translates into unique benefits and the best rental solutions for your jobsite.

United Rentals, Inc. is the largest equipment rental company in the world. As of December 31, 2023, the company had an integrated network of 1,504 rental locations in North America, 38 in Europe, 23 in Australia and 19 in New Zealand. In North America, the company operates in 49 states and every Canadian province. The company’s approximately 26,300 employees at December 31, 2023 serve construction and industrial customers, utilities, municipalities, homeowners and others. The company offers approximately 4,800 classes of equipment for rent with a total original cost of $20.66 billion. United Rentals is a member of the Standard & Poor’s 500 Index, the Barron’s 400 Index and the Russell 3000 Index and is headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut USA.

Name: Lowe Rental
Description:
Lowe Rental is the global market leader of sustainable rental services.  From refrigeration and cold rooms to catering equipment and kitchen infrastructure, we rent the critical equipment businesses need to seamlessly store, serve, or sell food and beverages.  Our fully managed rental services ensure businesses have the right equipment, when they need it, where they need it.

Founded in 1977, Lowe Rental have a dedicated team of c.500+ employees and operate from 12 strategic distribution centres around the world.  With an impressive fleet of 100,000 pieces of refrigeration and catering equipment, 1000+ portable kitchens and over 4 decades of industry expertise, we serve a diverse range of sectors with innovative equipment rental solutions they can rely on. 

Strategically placed offices worldwide include United Kingdom, Spain, Germany, United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Hong Kong, Singapore and USA.

Email: info@lowerental.com
Phone: +44 (0) 28 9260 4619
http://www.lowerental.com

Name: Battlefield Equipment Rentals / Location d’équipement Battlefield
Description:
Battlefield Equipment Rentals – The Cat Rental Store, is your single source supplier of rental equipment, Caterpillar Compact Equipment, new & used equipment sales, specialty tools, building products, safety supplies and safety training programs for construction contractors, trades people, plant maintenance contractors and homeowners. Battlefield Equipment Rentals has a network of 68 branches across Manitoba, Ontario, Quebec, New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, Prince Edward Island, Newfoundland & Labrador, including its head office facility in Stoney Creek, Ontario. Battlefield Equipment Rentals sells over 300 brand name products and is the authorized distributor for such brands as Caterpillar, Spectra Precision / Trimble, Wacker Neuson, Stihl, Honda, SkyJack, Genie, Husqvarna, Atlas Copco, Bosch, Gorman-Rupp, as well as many others.

From rental equipment, construction supplies and tools to safety equipment and safety training, Battlefield Equipment Rentals can supply just about anything you need to get the job done. Equipment rentals are available at daily, weekly and monthly rates, which gives you the flexibility to rent that specific tool you need for the day, or for the project.

Name: Blue Offshore
Description:
Blue Offshore hires out innovative modular basket carousels, loading towers and tensioners in the worldwide oil & gas industry and the sustainable energy sector. We provide our equipment for offshore installation, transport, storage and repair of export cables, inter-array cables, umbilicals and flexible pipelines. We also provide engineering, analyses and technicians to support operations.

With extensive experience in offshore projects, our team runs a smooth operation from project planning until final demobilisation of our equipment.

We are ready to shift gears. With our modular rental equipment and experienced team we work with you to meet the tightest project schedules.

Name: KILOUTOU España
Description:
Alquilar, compartir.

En Kiloutou España nos esforzamos por ser la opción de referencia en alquiler de maquinaria, andamios y venta de consumibles y materiales de construcción; con más de 25.000 máquinas y herramientas y una red de 27 agencias en Madrid, Cataluña, Navarra, País Vasco, Comunidad Valenciana, Murcia y Aragón. Gestionamos un parque de maquinaria valorado en más de 50 millones de euros y un equipo de casi 300 personas dedicadas a ofrecer soluciones eficaces y cercanas a nuestros clientes. Nuestro compromiso: asesoramiento técnico personalizado, servicio ágil y soluciones de calidad para profesionales, industrias, constructoras, eventos y particulares.

Formamos parte del Groupe Kiloutou, tercera empresa de alquiler de maquinaria en Europa, con más de 600 agencias en Francia, Alemania, Italia, Dinamarca, Portugal, Polonia y España, un equipo de 7.000 personas y una facturación anual de 1.200 millones de euros.

Además, nos enorgullece contar con empresas expertas en sectores clave que ya forman parte del Grupo Kiloutou en España, cada una aportando valor desde su especialidad y reforzando nuestro compromiso de ser tu socio estratégico en alquiler de maquinaria:

Toolquick: alquiler de herramientas para profesionales.
Gloobal: especialistas en vehículos cesta para trabajos en altura en la vía pública.
Liftisa: soluciones seguras, eficientes y sostenibles para trabajos en altura.

 Reconocidos como Great Place to Work, reafirmamos nuestro compromiso con el bienestar de nuestro equipo y un entorno laboral de calidad.

 Trabajamos cada día por un mundo más responsable.

Name: Renta Sverige
Description:
Maskinuthyrarna som tror att frihet skapar engagemang. Vi finns för dig som bygger och skapar nytt, renoverar och förbättrar. Men också för dig som vill jobba med stor frihet, som bryr sig om det lokala närområdet och som ser styrkan i att förena sig nationellt. Det lilla bolagets charm och det storas muskler: det är Renta det. Och du är varmt välkommen att antingen hyra av oss eller bli en av oss.

Stor Frihet
Maskinerna i alla ära, vi är problemlösare. Har kollegan eller kunden behov av en hjälpande hand, då ger vi denne två. Vi kallar det sunt Rentaförnuft

Lokala
Det lokala närområdet betyder allt. Vi tipsar, hugger i och lyssnar – för vi bryr oss. Om varandra, om kunden: om orten vi verkar och bor i.

Förenade tillsammans
Vi finns för hela Sverige. Från norr till söder, öst till väst. Med det lilla bolagets charm och det storas muskler: det är Renta det.

Name: Spurge Rentals
Description:
We at Spurge offer a wide range of Rental IT equipment including Laptops, Desktops, and IT accessories. We also have new, used, and refurbished Laptops, Desktops/Computers, Servers, IT Accessories, and IPads available for sale. 
With our services mapped PAN India, we deliver and pick products from your doorstep with ease, and need not worry about the quantity and maintenance after renting products. We are here to assist you with 360-degree technical support.

Are you an individual looking for a laptop or a desktop on a rental?
Do you have a requirement for a bulk quantity of Laptops for your office?
We got you covered ….

So place your order and leave the rest to us!

Reach us at  +91 783-783-2929 or +91 903-398-0736

Or drop an e-mail at info@spurgeit.com

Thanks for stopping by. Do follow us to stay connected!!

Name: CES Power
Description:
CES Power: Global Leader in Rental Power and Temperature Control Solutions | Specializing in Event and Entertainment Industries

At CES Power, we are at the forefront of providing rental power and temperature control solutions worldwide. Our expertise lies in supporting the event and entertainment industries, where we excel in meticulous planning, expert engineering, top-of-the-line equipment, and award-winning technical support. Our ultimate goal is to comprehend and empower your event.

We offer a comprehensive range of services that guarantee the realization of your vision. Whether you're organizing a sporting event, festival, concert, or other large-scale event or have temporary power and climate control needs, CES Power delivers reliable solutions tailored to your needs.

With a track record of proven success and an unwavering commitment to excellence, we take immense pride in being a trusted partner for businesses across the globe. "Powering Your Vision" is not merely a tagline for us; it serves as our guiding principle.

Unleash the potential of your event or production with CES Power's transformative solutions. Connect with us today to explore the endless possibilities and turn your event into an unforgettable success.

Name: ABC Geradores
Description:
A ABC Geradores é especialista em infraestrutura temporária de energia, Plataformas aéreas e Chillers. Atuamos com excelência técnica, agilidade e segurança, oferecendo soluções completas para os mais diversos segmentos. Nosso propósito vai muito além de energia — entregamos confiabilidade, parceria e inovação.

Fundada por profissionais com sólida experiência no setor de locação (rental), a ABC alia conhecimento técnico e visão estratégica para garantir alto desempenho em cada projeto, sempre respeitando rigorosamente as normas e exigências técnicas.

Somos movidos por pessoas. Além de uma gestão humanizada, acreditamos que o diferencial está em quem faz acontecer. Por isso, investimos continuamente em capacitação, reconhecimento e políticas que valorizam a qualidade de vida e o bem-estar dos nossos colaboradores.

Acreditamos que a prosperidade nos negócios é resultado de um trabalho feito com comprometimento, dedicação e paixão. E é essa energia que nos move todos os dias.
Location: São Bernardo do Campo, São Paulo

Name: Andrews Sykes Group plc
Description:
As the UK’s largest specialist hire company, we provide the best pumps, heating and cooling equipment for virtually every need, location and application. Our aim is to help our customers to address the real-life challenges they face-whether planned or emergency-in the fastest, most expert, professional and cost effective ways. We offer the safest, most reliable equipment sourced from the world’s top manufacturers.

Serving all industry sectors: from small businesses to multi-site operations and international corporation, including building and construction companies, industry, retail, banking and finance, leisure and hospitality, facilities management, manufacturing, utilities, oil chemicals, government, healthcare, the armed forces emergency services. From off-the-shelf products to fully customised solutions, including tailored service and maintenance, our objective is to ensure our customers' equipment operates reliably and efficiently, minimising their overall costs and carbon footprint, as well as providing a comfortable environment for employees, customers and visitors.
 
Andrew Sykes has depots strategically placed to offer a local service across the UK. We have over 300 dedicated employees trained and ready to help you.  The dedication of our people and the values of our company give our customers the trust and faith to use our service time and time again.

Name: PNO
Description:
The Nordics’ leading trailer rental company.

We are a family-owned company based on the values of responsibility and common sense. It has been that way since 1975 when Per Nelson Ørnstrand (PNO) founded the company. Since then, the next generation of the Ørnstrand family has now taken over, and today, Jacob Lee Ørnstrand is in charge.
                        
PNO believes in long-term customer relationships based on trust, and the importance of taking responsibility as a company – not only in relation to our customers but also towards the environment and our employees.
                
Our purpose is to lead the transition to sustainable freight, and we strongly believe that PNO can be a key driver of change in the logistics industry.

We are investing in innovation and digitalization. PNO Ventures is our in-house, innovation hub dedicated to developing new ways to add value to customers, and how we continue to develop in an ever-changing market.

Based out of our head office in Copenhagen, and with branches in Helsinki, Oslo, Hamburg, Helsingborg in Sweden, Horsens in Denmark, Venlo in the Netherlands and Poland we have come to have the Nordics’ largest range of short and long-term trailer rentals.

PNO is a B Corp.

Name: Opifex-Synergy
Description:
Opifex-Synergy, our customers are our equipment partners. We understand builders because we were founded by builders. It is our goal to maximize your uptime on the job with the best equipment experience possible. We are in the people business...we just happen to live and breathe construction equipment. 

Founded in 2012, Opifex-Synergy draws on our team members' decades of equipment experience to provide a level of service that is unmatched in our industry. As one of the fastest growing equipment companies in the nation,we are continuing our expansion to better serve you in additional markets where you are working now and in the future. 

Opifex-Synergy provides a comprehensive spectrum of equipment solutions for earth moving, aerial access, material handling, compaction, water removal and trench safety. Our expert team supports the needs of general and specialty contractors, industrial plants, mining and landfill operations, government agencies, golf course developers and road builders.

Name: VIRAJ - Vélo en Entreprise
Description:
Chez Viraj, nous avons pour mission de convertir le plus grand nombre de salariés au vélo sur les trajets quotidiens et notamment sur les déplacements domicile-travail.

Pour cela, nous proposons aux entreprises un service de vélos électriques connectés, équipés et assurés, individuels ou partagés. C'est une offre clé en main destinée aux salariés !

L'offre Viraj, c'est : 
 Nos vélos électriques assurés casse & vol, en individuel ou partagé,
 Antivol, casque & sacoche inclus
 Un accompagnement des salariés dans leur mise en selle

Pour les accompagner dans ce tournant, nous proposons à vos salariés à vélo d'intégrer la cyclo-communauté Viraj : un programme d’accompagnement et de motivation complet : des animations, afterworks, etc.

Prenez le tournant des nouvelles mobilités ! Osez proposer à vos salariés une nouvelle façon de venir au travail.

Name: Acces Industrie
Description:
ACCES INDUSTRIE , spécialiste en location et vente de nacelles et plateformes élévatrices de personnes, et chariots télescopiques.

UN SERVICE A LA HAUTEUR : voilà ce qui fait la force d’ACCES INDUSTRIE !

Nous nous engageons à vous satisfaire !

Notre métier est avant tout un métier de services, où au-delà de l’activité même de location, les aspects logistiques et techniques sont essentiels : 
-    assistance technique, 
-    services d’entretien et de réparation, 
-    livraison et récupération sur site, 
autant de spécificités maîtrisées qui rendent unique l’offre ACCES INDUSTRIE et en font le véritable partenaire de ses clients !

Name: Texas First Rentals
Description:
What do you really want -- and expect -- from your equipment rental provider?

We went to our customers who gave us excellent feedback.  We heard all about:

The red tape and paperwork required by the leading national rental companies. 
Constant over promising -- and under delivering – by too many suppliers.
Unreliable equipment that breaks down in the middle of a project creating expensive downtime.
The frustrations of equipment not available when it’s needed.
We took all this to heart and decided to create a new kind of rental services company. But it had to be one that we ourselves would like to do business with. The result is nothing you’d expect, and everything you’d want from a rental services company.

We call it Texas First Rentals and we’d like you to give us a try.

If you have a construction project to complete, a facility to manage, or a special need to figure out, we have an affordable solution with a full line of aerial, dirt, and power equipment. We promise to do whatever it takes to make your job easier and more successful.
Texas First is a sister company of HOLT CAT, the largest Caterpillar dealer in the United States. The Holt family has been serving customers for over eight decades in the Texas market. We’ve learned the in’s and out’s of service, safety, quality, and high performance.
You can rent the Cat equipment you’ve always trusted for your toughest jobs – plus a whole lot more: equipment from Genie, JLG, Sullair, Wacker, Laymor, Vermeer and a lot of other top-notch manufacturers. We offer specialty equipment like booms, and aerial platforms along with pumps, welders and concrete & masonry equipment and tools.  
The main thing is that we’re committed to doing business the right way…the Texas Way. That means honesty and straight talk sealed with a hand shake. We won’t be perfect, but when we make a mistake, we’ll own up to it and always make it right.

Name: Rentkar
Description:
Rentkar started as a simple idea to earn pocket money by sharing personal products like PlayStations, musical instruments, and laptops around college. Tanuj Agarwalla, along with co-founders Mudit and Kudale, spent their days delivering items themselves, often returning home late, but fueled by excitement for the potential this venture held.

During the lockdown, the business took a more defined shape. As deliveries slowed, the team had time to reflect on Rentkar's purpose. One thing stood out from their early interactions with households—almost every home had 2-4 unused products just sitting idle. This realization sparked a bigger vision: Rentkar could become a platform that encourages people to share and rent rather than buy.

Today, Rentkar’s mission is to fight overconsumption by promoting a sharing economy. We empower people to access the products they need without the burden of ownership, driving more sustainable lifestyles. Our platform allows users to rent everything from electronics to gaming consoles, reducing waste and giving people more freedom in how they consume.

Our vision is to create a world where renting becomes a norm, where everyone has access to products without overbuying or wasting resources. In the next five years, Rentkar aims to be the leading multicity lifestyle platform for rentals, revolutionizing how we think about ownership.

As we continue to grow, we remain focused on leveraging technology to create a seamless customer experience, building community, and helping people live smarter through renting. Join us as we shape a future where sharing is the new standard of living.

Name: BigRentz
Description:
BigRentz is a construction procurement software platform with over 6,000 active rental companies and 14,000 rental yards in its network. Leveraging this network, BigRentz can deliver equipment and services to over 90% of job sites in the U.S. within a 30 minute drive, and 98% within an hour. This is critical to contractors and service providers because nearly 40% of rental cost is tied to the transportation of equipment to and from job sites. Construction-related businesses spend about 35% of a typical week on non-optional activities such as procuring equipment, labor, and materials. With BigRentz, customers can expect to save 15-20% on rental management when including the all-in costs of transportation, time spent sourcing, and servicing issues. For more insights and information, please visit https://bigrentz.com.

As an ISO 9001 Certified Company, we are committed to continuously improving our processes to maintain a higher standard. When you partner with BigRentz, you know your company's equipment rental procurement is in the hands of a team you can rely on to meet and exceed your expectations.

Vårt syfte - Vi jobbar för att alla ska komma hem oskadda varje dag.

Offrez à vos collaborateurs une expérience mémorable, qui stimulera leur créativité et leur esprit d’équipe !

 Nos offres :

• Croisières privées pour particuliers (à la journée, week-end, semaine)

• Ateliers collaboratifs pour booster l’innovation et la cohésion

Name: Contractor Solutions Trench Shoring
Description: Contractor Solutions is a equipment rental & sales company that specializes in underground safety equipment & supplies.  Dave Hehr, founder and owner, sold his first piece of equipment in 2006 and the company has continued to grow!  The company opened their Omaha, Nebraska location in the fall of 2016 in order to continue growth and offer products to customers in Nebraska, Western Iowa, & parts of South Dakota.  Contractor Solutions is a proud and exclusive Pro-Tec Equipment dealer for Iowa & Nebraska.  The company strives to offer sewer, water, & underground utility contractors trench boxes, shoring equipment, and safety equipment as its primary focus.  The company aims to be a "one stop shop" for the utility contractor industry and offers a full line of pipe & rotary lasers, water pumps & generators, light towers, street plates, steel sheet pile, hydro-excavation vacuum trailers, excavator swamp mats, pneumatic pipe plugs, pipe testing equipment, compaction equipment, manhole grouting products, confined space equipment, utility locators, and a fully stocked showroom that showcases supplies needed to get the job done!  The business also is entrenched in NUCA chapters of Iowa, Nebraska, Missouri, & Oklahoma and offers annual safety training to contractors around the region.  The customer is our focus and we are value driven to team with our customers to offer the best possible products and service to help our customers succeed!  Contractor Solutions currently has five locations in Des Moines, Omaha, Kansas City, St. Louis & Tulsa.

Name: Exellent Syd AB
Description:
Tunga tjänster med högsta miljöklass
Vi hyr ut marknadens modernaste renhållningsbilar av högsta miljöklass från NTM, Skandinaviens största leverantör av påbyggnader för lastbilar med specialutrustning. Spolbilar med samma höga miljöklassning kommer från Europas ledande leverantör, Cappellotto. Vi är baserade i Helsingborg och Staffanstorp med huvudkontoret i Landskrona.

Vår verksamhet
Kärnverksamheten består av tre segment, verkstad, uthyrning och tvätt av tunga fordon. Våra moderna verkstäder erbjuder verkstadstjänster för tunga fordon från marknadens ledande leverantörer som Scania, Volvo och Mercedes. Uthyrningen av entreprenadmaskiner, sop- och spolbilar vänder sig till kommuner och företag i hela Skandinavien. Ingen ort är för avlägsen då Exellent har resurser och rätt samarbetspartners i hela regionen. Utöver verkstadstjänster och uthyrning erbjuder Exellent även tvättjänster för tunga fordon.

Miljöarbetet genomsyrar hela verksamheten
Under våren 2017 öppnade vi en av Sveriges modernaste miljöanpassade serviceverkstäder strax utanför Helsingborg, intill E6/E4, mellan trafikplatserna Vasatorp och Kropp. Den nya anläggningen omfattar 5.000 kvm och i anslutning till verkstaden finns även en miljöklassad tvättstation som är öppen för alla typer av tunga fordon som lastbilar och bussar.

Name: nornnorn
Description:
nornnorn was founded on a simple idea: comfort should be sustainable — and not cost the earth.

Rooted in a near-century family heritage in mattress manufacturing, we’re reimagining how people use and renew the products they live with every day.

We’re the world’s first Circular Economy Product-as-a-Service platform, combining product subscriptions with end-of-life take-back and recycling.

Operating at the intersection of E-Commerce, FinTech, and RecyclingTech, nornnorn makes access to high-value, long-life products affordable for both businesses and consumers — while keeping materials in circulation and reducing waste and emissions.

Our first product category is premium mattresses, designed for longevity and hotel-level comfort. When each subscription ends, every item is collected, disassembled, and recycled — free of charge — with over 90% material recovery.

On the R&D side, we drive the development of innovative recycling technologies and study the environmental impacts of mattress usage. Past collaborations include polyurethane foam recycling technology research with the Asian Institute of Technology (AIT) and the University of Cambridge, as well as Thailand’s first-ever mattress life cycle assessment (LCA) with the Technology and Informatics Institute for Sustainability (TIIS).

nornnorn is a venture under the UK Global Entrepreneur Programme (GEP) and has been recognised by PwC, the ASEAN Secretariat, EU SWITCH-Asia, the ASEAN CSR Network, and others as a leading example of scalable circular innovation.

Our mission is simple: to make sustainability effortless and circular living second nature.

Because good rest should never go to waste.
nornnorn — Make Room for Better.

Si la formule classique a des avantages, Rent and Drop vous invite à découvrir une autre façon de louer un camion : la location en aller simple.

Choisir la location en aller simple, c’est profiter de nombreux avantages ! En évitant le trajet de retour pour rendre le véhicule, vous profitez :

- D’une location plus économique : un trajet en moins donc une économie de 50% sur les péages et le carburant
- D’une location plus simple : la restitution du camion se fait à l’agence la plus proche de votre lieu d’arrivée
- D’une location plus sûre : moins de temps sur la route, donc moins de risques
- D’une location plus écologique : avec un trajet unique, les émissions de CO2 sont réduites de 50%.

Pour un service de location en aller simple efficace, Rent and Drop s’appuie sur un réseau de plus de 100 agences de location de véhicules utilitaires, couvrant l'intégralité du territoire français : retrouvez votre agence de location en aller simple Rent and Drop à Paris, Lille, Lyon, Bordeaux, Nice, Marseille, Montpellier, Toulouse… Il y a toujours une agence Rent and Drop près de vos lieux de départ et de retour, pour réduire au maximum votre trajet et faciliter votre location.

De plus, Rent and Drop possède une flotte de véhicules utilitaires composée de plus de 2000 camions disponibles à la location : vous avez la possibilité de choisir le camion offrant le volume de chargement qui répond à vos besoins, camion de 3m³, 6m³, 12m³ 16m³ ou 20m³ avec et sans hayon.

Rent and Drop propose aussi des solutions de location d'utilitaires dédiée aux professionnels en aller simple à l'occasion de Salon, Exposition ou événements.

Name: Access Platform Equipments Limited
Description:
Access Platform Equipments Ltd. (APEL) was established, focused at providing Aerial Access Solutions designed for manpower safety and reducing project time & costs. Our products have been worldwide tested for safe access up to a vertical height of 300 meters. We are based in India, with a customer database in 20+ states.

What we do?
The Aerial Access Solutions are designed in accordance to the project & site requirements. Our services include equipment technical consultation, design, installation, mobilization, erection, leasing, maintenance, operation and project execution to provide access at heights.

How we do?
Our powered access rental fleet consists of young-aged equipments which conform with European Safety Standards (CE) or American National Safety Standards (ANSI). We recommend our customers to ask for a certified machine only.

Our flagship products including Rack and Pinion type Mast-climbing working platforms & Construction/Industrial Hoists. Be it a Zone 1, a flame-proof or an explosion-proof application, or be it an everyday construction work site. We can lease out specific machines according to your very specific requirements.

Being a 1-stop complete Aerial Access Solution provider, we also stock Mobile Elevating Work Platforms such as Man/Boom lifts, Trailer Mounted/Crawler/Spider type special Man lifts, Scissor lifts, Vehicle Mounted lifts & Light weight Vertical Mast Platforms.

Why we do?
1. Safety:  To increase manpower Safety while working at heights.
2. Time:  To reduce Time taken for manpower to access heights.
3. Energy/Environment: To support the use of Energy Efficient Technologies with reduced carbon footprints.
4. Cost:  To reduce resources and Cost incurred in reaching at a height.

We always ask our customers, If they can Rent out Safety from the best, Why Buy from anywhere else?

Name: LOXAM Danmark
Description:
Danmarks og Europas største materieludlejer. 

LOXAM er den naturlige partner for bygge- og anlægsvirksomheder. Vi plejer at sige, "Du har hænderne – vi har maskinerne".
Vores kerneforretning er at udleje materiel og værktøj til den danske bygge- og anlægsbranche samt til private. Men faktisk kan vi hjælpe med meget mere end gravemaskiner, lifte, skurvogne og håndværktøj. For ud over at stille værktøj og materiel til rådighed, så kan LOXAM også hjælpe med totalløsninger til byggepladsen  og rådgivning, så du får det helt rigtige til opgaven - alt det, som ikke er kernen i din egen forretning.

Der er sund fornuft i at lade LOXAM klare de serviceopgaver, som ikke har med håndværket at gøre. Så kan du og dine medarbejdere koncentrere jer om projekterne og om at udvikle kerneforretningen. Vi arbejder altid målrettet på, at finde den bedste løsning for dig og dit projekt.

LOXAM A/S er det juridiske selskabsnavn i Danmark og vi har 3 profilnavne: Rental – Access – Module.    
Hver profil med deres unikke fokus og ekspertise. 

Rental = Anlægs- og byggemateriel samt liftmateriel op til 20 m.
Access = Liftmateriel op til 58 m., store bemandede liftvogne og speciallifte.
Module = Skurvogne, pavilloner, containere, modulbyer, toilet- og badmobiler. 

LOXAM etablerede sig i Danmark i 2007 ved at købe DNE Materieludlejning A/S og JJ Maskinudlejning A/S. I LOXAM A/S arbejder vi videre på det succesfulde og velkendte fundament, som de tidligere virksomheder var med til at grundlægge – ”Kvalitet og god service til kunderne”. 

Koncernen har ca. 11.900 medarbejdere fordelt på over 1120 afdelinger i 30 lande. I Danmark har vi 37 afdelinger fordelt i hele landet. Vi er ca. 350 medarbejdere og har en materielportefølje på mere end 30.000 enheder.

Name: CADDENZ
Description:
Location d'équipements de chantier
CADDENZ est un des leaders dans la location et la vente d’équipements de sécurisation et de signalisation de chantiers pour le BTP. Avec 27 agences en Europe, dont 18 en France, nous intervenons avec une réactivité, une qualité de conseil et de service de premier plan. Nos 350 collaborateurs sont engagés au quotidien pour viser la pleine satisfaction de nos clients.

Nous proposons des panneaux de signalisation, feux, miroirs, cônes et balisages, des plaques de franchissement et protections de sol, des barrières, palissades et clôtures de chantier ainsi que des séparateurs de voies. De plus, si vous cherchez des bases vies et des solutions modulaires d’hébergement sur les chantiers, nous pouvons répondre à ses besoins.

Nous proposons également une offre de services intégrés tels que la location avec chauffeur d’engins de chantier, l’analyse de besoins et de plans, la supervision de chantier, la livraison, l’installation ainsi que la gestion clés en mains des autorisations de voirie.

Pourquoi choisir Caddenz ?
Nos différents points d’accueil et de stockage nous donne la capacité de procurer à nos clients du matériel de chantier rapidement, y compris avec des délais serrés voire en situation d’urgence, et en grande quantité si besoin. Avec des implantations en Allemagne, aux Pays-Bas et d'autres pays, Caddenz vous offre une véritable proximité : nous pouvons répondre aux besoins de nos clients avec une très grande réactivité, et des produits disponibles près des installations à réaliser. 

Notre approche globale, basée sur l’intimité clients, offre un accompagnement complet et sur-mesure pour chaque projet.

Nos équipes possèdent toute l’expertise pour conseiller sur les solutions les plus adaptées à chaque projet. Elles prendront notamment en compte le terrain, l’emplacement, mais aussi l’équipement utilisé et/ou prévu sur le chantier (pelle, véhicules avec pneus spécifiques…).

Name: Maats Pipeline Professionals
Description:
For nearly 40 years, MAATS is one of the leading suppliers and manufacturers of pipeline construction equipment and services to the pipeline industry. MAATS supplies a wide variety of specialized construction machinery such as pipe layers, welding tractors, bending machines and related equipment for new pipeline construction as well as for pipeline maintenance and repair. MAATS produces high quality pipeline equipment under its own label. The MAATS label consists of a program of heavy-duty bending machines & bending sets, pipe layers, welding tractors, roller cradles, c-cradles and a variety of custom engineered equipment.

MAATS is the authorized global representative for the sale of new Liebherr pipe layers. MAATS and Liebherr developed a range of pipe layers with lifting capacities ranging from 20 to over 90 tons. The MAATS head office and equipment yard are located in the Netherlands. This central location enables the shipment of equipment to jobsites anywhere in the world quickly and easily. To meet worldwide customers’ demands locally, MAATS has established an extensive network of regional companies, agents and partners. Combined with the vast Liebherr network, MAATS’ presence is truly global.

One of MAATS’ primary objectives is to supply our customers with the specialized equipment they need for the construction of pipelines. Where projects vary in diameter, length and location, MAATS understands that construction companies cannot have all equipment available. With our extensive equipment fleet and variety of services, MAATS is able to supply the complete package.

Name: Petit Forestier France
Description:
Parce que les professionnels ont besoin de mener leur activité en toute sérénité, notre mission chez Petit Forestier est de garantir la continuité opérationnelle et de simplifier la chaîne du froid de nos clients.

Nous sommes leaders de la location frigorifique et proposons une large offre de véhicules, containers et meubles frigorifiques. Ce qui nous engage, c’est notre volonté de délivrer un full service de qualité et personnalisé et de donner accès à nos clients aux dernières innovations et réglementations. Il permet à tous ceux qui nous font confiance de garantir leur chaîne du froid 7/7, 24/24.

Avec nos partenaires carrossiers industriels intégrés, nous concevons des solutions reconnues / éprouvées à température dirigée pour transporter et stocker le froid plus durablement. Présents dans 21 pays en Europe, Afrique, Moyen-Orient et aux Etats-Unis, nous avons un réseau de 300 agences de proximité.

Marque historique de Petit Forestier Group, entreprise familiale créée en 1907, nous bénéficions des expertises et de l’innovation d’un Groupe dédié à la maîtrise de la chaîne du froid durable dans toutes ses composantes, de la fabrication industrielle jusqu’au reconditionnement des assets frigorifiques pour une économie plus durable.

Name: LGH UK
Description:
LGH, formerly known as Lifting Gear Hire, is the largest single organisation devoted exclusively to providing lifting and moving equipment for hire. With over 30,000 pieces, LGH holds the most comprehensive inventory of hoisting, rigging, jacking, pulling, material handling, and safety equipment.

As the world turns, we lift. It’s what we do and we do it well, delivering the safety, certainty and service you need to get the job done. We combine the highest quality equipment, unrivalled experience, and leading expertise, with excellent customer service to ensure the best solution to meet your lifting challenges. Whatever the location, whatever the load, LGH can take the strain, with unmatched reliability, range and global resources.

MISSION
LGH’s mission is to support customers across the globe with the safest and most reliable lifting and rigging gear, through continuous investment in our people, our equipment, and our IT systems. 

VALUES
Honour - Innovation - Respect - Excellence

INDUSTRIES 
We serve multiple industries, including construction & maintenance, energy & utilities, petrochemical & pharmaceutical, marine, transport, offshore, water, nuclear, mechanical & electrical, and infrastructure.

Name: Soto Servicios Industriales SRL
Description: Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios especializados para la industria, incluyendo el alquiler de tráileres habitacionales y equipos, desmontaje, transporte y montaje (DTM), saneamiento en yacimientos, así como la fabricación de módulos a medida. Estos módulos abarcan diversas necesidades, desde espacios habitacionales hasta salas de reunión, oficinas, gimnasios, comedores, entre otros.

Name: Aggcon Equipments International
Description: Aggcon Equipments International Limited, with our establishment in the year, 2003 are engaged in  Our services meet the diverse construction and building needs of multinational organizations, private sector, government organizations, multi storied buildings, main roads, rural roads, highways, airports and motorways.

Name: SRS Cleaning Equipment
Description:
We are one of the UK’s leading providers of industrial sweepers and scrubber dryers for hire and sale. Trusted by thousands of sites nationwide, we deliver at scale with family business values.

As a circular solutions provider, all of our services work to maximise equipment use, extend machine life, and reduce waste. Our approach supports both performance and sustainability.

Our dedicated logistics team and national engineer network ensure reliable delivery and service UK-wide. Our commitment to quality, sustainability, and personal service keeps British industry spotless every day.

Name: MONGEL Guindastes & Transportes
Description:
Atuando desde 1983, o Grupo Mongel vem se solidificando no mercado de prestação de serviços e locação de guindastes telescópicos, transportes especiais e montagens industriais. Teve seu início na cidade de Tarumã/SP expandindo-se rapidamente por todo o estado de São Paulo e atualmente atende em todas as regiões do Brasil.
Com mais de 35 anos de experiência, vem conquistando a cada dia, conhecimento, amizade e cases de sucesso que marcam nossa história e formam sua presença cada vez maior e mais respeitado no mercado.

Name: Cross Rental Services

We manufacture our containerised Boilers here in Andover and also service and maintain our hire fleet, delivering pristine hire equipment to customers across the country.

Name: Engineered Rigging
Description: Engineered Rigging provides pioneering heavy lifting solutions around the globe. With decades of hands-on experience and unparalleled technical expertise, we don't just lift heavy objects; we conquer the world's most intricate lifting challenges and machinery moves for a variety of industries. Our bare rental program empowers customers to self-perform heavy lifts. We also sell, test and service an array of heavy lifting and specialized transport equipment, provide cutting-edge engineering services, custom solutions, in-house fabrication and unwavering technical support.

Name: Centurion Canada Rentals and Services
Description:
Our primary focus is achieving customer satisfaction through quality service and equipment, sensible equipment innovations, and safety.

Our equipment and services include cranes, track hoe packages, wastewater and water management, power and lighting, combination units, remote security and communications, work camps, solar-powered zero vent wellsite services and wellsite accommodation and heavy equipment.

Name: Pioneer Offroad Rentals & Sanitary Solutions
Description:
Pioneer Offroad Rentals 

Rentals - Training - Service - Sales

Pioneer Offroad Rental's is your remote access full solution provider. With convenient branch locations in Athabasca, Bonnyville, Edmonton, Fort McMurray, Fort St. John and Grande Prairie we make it simpler than ever for our customers to get to their remote commercial locations and back with the right choice of off-road equipment.  

We offer rentals of: 
ATV's - UTV's - Argo's -  Snowmobiles - Alltrack Carriers - Trailers - Deluxe Portable Washroom's & Accessories

ATV's - UTV's - Argo's - Snowmobiles - First Aid & More

Visit our website at   www.pioneerrentals.ca or call us today.

Name: Q Crane & Plant Hire Limited
Description:
Based in Oldham, Greater Manchester, Q Crane & Plant Hire have over 50 year’s experience in supplying Crawler Cranes  to all aspects of the Construction Industry including Civil Engineering, Building, Tunnelling & Shafts, Marine & Water, Piling, Bridge Construction, Nuclear and Petrochemical Industries to name a few.

We have a modern fleet of Lattice Boom & Telescopic Crawler Cranes ranging from 5T to 250T, Tracked Excavators ranging from 3T to 45T, Wheeled Excavators ranging from 14T to 21T, 12m-18m Long Reach Excavators & Dumpers up to 10T. 

We can supply all equipment on a Self Drive or Operated basis with a nationwide network of CITB / CPCS qualified operators complimented by our own dedicated transport department capable of transporting all our equipment.

Name: CanLift Equipment Ltd.
Description:
CanLift Equipment Ltd. is one of Ontario’s largest independently owned lift equipment providers and has earned a reputation for reliability and excellence. 

CanLift rents, sells, and services MEWP (Mobile Elevating Work Platform) equipment from top industry manufacturers with a customer base that ranges from small business end users to large corporate construction entities.

As a family-owned and operated business, CanLift has a service-centric approach, combining a competent and passionate sales team, a highly skilled service team, and a reputable network of partners with a large fleet of new and used equipment.

Name: Gomez Oviedo
Description:
Gomez Oviedo fue fundada en 1947 por José Gomez Oviedo, quien comenzó en el mundo empresarial muy joven con una fábrica de baldosa hidráulica en Oviedo. Más tarde creó una empresa dedicada al suministro, colocación y mantenimiento de cubiertas de pizarra, actividad que hoy en día continúa dentro del grupo.

Posteriormente se introduce una nueva línea de negocio, el alquiler y venta de maquinaria, que hoy en día es la actividad principal del grupo.

Con el paso de los años  hemos ido creciendo con una gran solidez, gracias a la experiencia aportada por tantos años en el mundo empresarial y a nuestro saber hacer, lo que nos ha permitido ser un punto de referencia en los sectores en los que proporcionamos nuestros servicios. Hoy en día es su hijo quien está al frente del grupo, heredero de ese espíritu empresarial donde la rentabilidad y la sostenibilidad priman sobre la dimensión.

En la actualidad, contamos con servicios de alquiler y venta de maquinaria y vehículos, cubiertas de pizarra y renting.

Nuestros principales clientes se concentran en sectores como la construcción, obra pública, infraestructuras, industria, energía, mantenimiento, jardinería y eventos.

Contamos con un equipo de más de 120 personas y delegaciones en Asturias, donde se encuentra la central, Cantabria, Madrid y Málaga, donde ofrecemos un servicio de alta calidad y un asesoramiento personalizado. Desde el año 2012 contamos con delegaciones en David y Santiago de Veraguas en Panamá.

Nuestros valores son la honestidad, innovación, excelencia, liderazgo y orientación al cliente, y nuestro objetivo seguir ofreciendo un servicio de alta calidad, adaptándonos continuamente al mercado, mirando hacia delante, pero conservando nuestros valores, que han sido una constante desde hace más de 60 años.

Webs: www.gorentalstore.com (portal de alquiler de maquinaria Online) y www.gomezoviedo.com (web corporativa)

Name: Allrent computer verhuur
Description:
Allrent rental for temporary IT solutions; from one hour to several months.

High level of service: ready to use, where desired with permanent guidance.

Name: ATPS
Description: Founded in 1995, ATPS is specialized in renting finishers, sprayers, and powerfeeders with operators throughout Europe. Today, ATPS is a company of about 160 employees, 100 finishers, 20 sprayers and 4 powerfeeders. The company’s head office is located in the Paris region, we have a special team for major projects and 12 branches close to Bordeaux, Nantes, Paris, Rouen, Tours, Lyon, Toulon, Narbonne and Dijon. Our teams are then spread across the entire territory, allowing us to offer our customers a dense network and increased availability, making us the first company in this niche business. Every year we develop our geographical presence and improve our material offer. Our operators benefit from a quality training plan, which allows us to offer our customers a quality service as well. We focus on the maintenance and renewal of our equipment to minimize the risk of breakdowns, have a team of technicians to intervene on site when needed, and replacement equipment. Safety is part of the DNA of the company, we undergo regular audits on this subject allowing us to constantly improve and comply with all the regulations in force.

Name: Loxea Kenya
Description:
Loxea is an international franchise offering operating leasing and fleet management and operating in 21 African countries with a fleet of over 6000 vehicles. Loxea Kenya was launched in December 2019 with expertise in operating lease and fleet management and dedicated to our corporate customers.
Loxea Limited offers:-
Leasing:- Supply of vehicles through our partners CFAO Motors Kenya Limited, giving you 100% right of use. This eliminates the need for your business to commit capital to purchase vehicles by either using its own resources of borrowing from a bank.
Vehicle Maintenance:-Routine Service or a full maintenance package? The choice is yours to make as the lessee. We handle the communication to ensure the customer is informed in real time as the vehicles get serviced and maintained by professionals at the CFAO Motors Service Centers. 
Insurance:-The leased vehicles remain comprehensively insured during the lease period. We take the responsibility of making follow ups with the underwriter on all claims. In case of the vehicle being garaged due to an accident, the lessee enjoys a like for like courtesy car for up to 20 days.  
Relief Cars:-in the event of your leased vehicle being grounded, Loxea has a fleet of relief vehicle to offer you as per the lease agreement. A like for like for you to remain mobile and focus on your core business.  
Tracking and Fleet Management:- Leased vehicles remain tracked throughout the lease term. Loxea provides tracking reports that give professional advice on safety, driver behavior, fuel consumption just to name a few. 
Tyres and Batteries:- At an additional competitive price ,we will change tyres and batteries as recommended by the vehicle manufacturer or you can opt to change the tyres and batteries at your own cost. 
Driver supply and Management:- In case you require the vehicles supplied with a driver we provide and manage the service

Name: Orbital Equipment Ltd
Description:
Orbital Equipment are a well established, leading plant hire company supplying the south east of the UK and beyond with modern, market leading equipment. 
We supply a wide variety of customers with operated and self drive plant.
Our excellent reputation has been built on our modern plant, competitive rates and even more so, our unrivalled level of customer service we provide.

Dumpers from 0.5 ton to 10 ton, 
Articulated Dump Trucks from 25 ton to 30 ton,

Rollers from 1.5 ton to 16 ton. 
We also supply all kinds of attachments and miscellaneous items such as bowsers etc.

Name: HAPPEE Services
Description:
Créée en 1962, Happee Services, anciennement PSV, est la référence en location de sanitaires mobiles et services associés pour l’événementiel et pour l'espace urbain. Foires, salons, festivals, rencontres sportives, défilés de mode, guinguettes… Chaque jour, les équipes mettent tout en œuvre pour apporter des solutions de toilettes, douches, lavabos, ainsi que la plomberie et les permanences techniques et nettoyage. L’entreprise répond ainsi aux attentes des grandes manifestations culturelles et sportives (Solidays, Rock en Seine, We Love Green, Lollapalooza, Paris Plage, Marathons, Stade de France…) comme des événements plus intimes (mariages, séminaires, salons, défilés de mode lors de la fashion week…).

Avec cette nouvelle identité, HAPPEE Services souhaite plus que jamais affirmer sa mission d’accès à l’hygiène partout et pour tous. 

HAPPEE Services en quelques chiffres : 
- 1300 événements nous font confiance 
- 2 implantations franciliennes 
- 20 véhicules d’exploitation dont 5 au gaz naturel 
- 30 experts à votre service 
- 15 000 matériels disponibles en location 
- 3 certifications : certifiée ISO 9001 norme qualité & ISO 14001 norme environnement, ISO 20121 en cours de certification

Name: Protec Equipment Resources
Description:
Protec Equipment Resources is a full service solutions provider of electrical test and measurement equipment.  Protec provides an extensive in-stock rental inventory, flexible terms, and customer service characterized by a personal, proactive, principled approach to optimizing rental operations.

Each of our eight Protec locations stocks a full complement of electrical test and measurement equipment.  Offering equipment from ABB, Doble, Dranetz, Eaton Cutler Hammer, ETI, Fluke, High Voltage, HV Diagnostics,Megger, Raytech, Square D by Schneider, Vanguard and other premium manufacturers, Protec offers for rent, lease or purchase, all the electrical testing equipment you need to get the job done.

Our calibration labs offer NIST-traceable calibration services, and our qualified technicians will ensure that your test instruments are working at peak performance and meet all manufacturer standards. Quick turnaround is standard, with most equipment completed in 5 business days or less.

Eliminate your overhead and minimize equipment downtime with Protec’s asset management services. We customize a unique solution for your business to store, calibrate and maintain your equipment for whenever you need it.

Protec is on the 2020 Inc. 5000 List of America's Fastest Growing Companies.

Name: TRS-RenTelco
Description:

To learn more about TRS-RenTelco, visit www.trsrentelco.com.

From a commitment to our employees to an unwavering integrity with our customers, we believe people are our most valuable asset.

Name: locarmor
Description:
Locarmor en quelques chiffres

Depuis sa création en 1970, voici plus de quarante ans par Georges CRENN et Maurice BOUCHÉ, à Quimper, la société Locarmor s’est spécialisée dans la location, la vente et la réparation de matériels et d’outillage pour le bâtiment, les travaux publics et l’industrie.

Aujourd’hui, le groupe LOCARMOR c’est 23 agences réparties sur toute la Bretagne. Nous disposons de 10 agences dans le Finistère (à Brest, Carhaix, Concarneau, Crozon, Landivisiau, Morlaix, Pont L’Abbé, Quimper nord, Quimper sud, Quimper siège social). Nous sommes présents dans le Morbihan avec 5 agences (Auray, Lorient, Ploërmel, Pontivy, Vannes), dans les Côtes d’Armor avec 7 agences (Dinan, Guingamp, Lamballe, Lannion, Loudéac, Paimpol, Saint Brieuc), une agence en Ille et Vilaine (Redon) et une agence en Loire Atlantique (Saint Nazaire).

Locarmor c’est 350 personnes à votre service du lundi au vendredi de 8h00 à 18h00.

Sept départements spécialisés

Locarmor regroupe des spécialistes autour de sept départements : les structures modulaires, l’élévation, les camions bennes, la manutention, le rabotage, le balayage industriel, le transport.

Name: Eqpme
Description:

Name: HUNE SPECIALIZED INTERNATIONAL CO. L.L.C.
Description:
HUNESICO is a joint venture company between Rolaco Trading Contracting Holding and HUNE Rental S.L. established 2014 in Saudi Arabia.

We offer short, medium and longterm rental of machinery and lifting platforms without drivers. We also offer power generators with high, medium or low power output, towerlights, forklifts, both electrical and diesel, earthmoving machines, as well as pre-fabricated modules for the building construction. We focus in the industrial, event, construction, energy and fleet service maintenance sectors. 

We count with an extensive machine park, where half of it are large machines. Through our operational structure we cover major metropolitan areas in the Kingdom: Jeddah, Dammam and Riyadh. Our staff is fully dedicated to satisfy customer needs, which have placed their trust on us, by providing our exceptional service of highest quality in the shortest period of time.

At HUNESICO we work towards making the world a safer place thus improving the interaction between machines and people.

Name: Delta Earthmoving, Inc.
Description:

Name: EMCO Services

visit: www.emcoservices.co.uk
Call: 01224 773030

Name: ACTIS Location

Name: LOXEA New Mobility Solutions

Name: NXGEN Group
Description:

Name: MOOV&COOK
Description:
MOOV&COOK, L'expert en cuisines mobiles ! 
La cuisine est une affaire de pros. Et c'est au cours de travaux de construction, de rénovation ou d'organisation d'événements... que l'on mesure à quel point on a aussi besoin de pros ! 
À l’écoute des chef(fe)s depuis 1997, nous nous faisons un devoir de leur fournir du matériel de qualité pour leur simplifier la vie. 
Vous planifiez des travaux de construction ou de rénovation, vous organisez un événement, votre cuisine doit être démontable ? 
Quel que soit votre style de cuisine et le nombre de repas à servir, nous disposons de la solution adaptée : contactez notre équipe, réactive et flexible, qui vous proposera des solutions adaptées à vos besoins. 
Ainsi, nous venons à votre rencontre pour expertiser le fonctionnement de votre cuisine et vous faire une proposition de modules équipés sur mesure. Nous gérons la livraison et l’installation de votre cuisine temporaire, ainsi que sa maintenance durant toute la durée de location. Une fois celle-ci arrivée à son terme, nous remettons les lieux en état après le démontage des cuisines modulaires par nos équipes. 
MOOV&COOK s’engage à respecter toutes ces étapes afin de vous assurer le meilleur matériel ainsi que la meilleure prestation possibles tout au long de votre location.
Notre objectif : vous garantir une cuisine de qualité partout !

Name: CDHorizon Indonesia

Name: Centurion - Asia Pacific Region
Description:
Rental equipment and service solutions for critical industries across Asia Pacific, including mining, renewables, oil and gas, infrastructure, defence, utilities and government.

Our offerings include:
•	Accommodation & Modular – Workforce camps, portable buildings and full site management services.
•	Lifting Services – Specialist equipment rental solutions for lifting, lowering, and positioning, backed by certified NATA accredited inspectors and mechanical experts. We manage our own fleet and support clients with IRM services to keep their equipment safe, compliant, and operational.
•	Power & Equipment – Portable power systems with access to technical support, on-site operators and mechanical inspection services.
We also support the safe handling, installation and retrieval of wellheads, manifolds and subsea trees with fit-for-purpose lifting and tooling packages.
•	Subsea Services – Specialist equipment and services for subsea drill support, construction, inspection, repair, maintenance, and decommissioning - supporting both ROV and diver operations.
•	Water & Wastewater Solutions – End-to-end treatment systems for potable, process, domestic and industrial water and wastewater.

Find out more about how we can assist you on your next project: https://centurionaprs.com

Name: TRANSGRUMA
Description:

Ağır kaldırma operasyonları, genel kargo ve dökme kuru yüklerin tahmil tahliyesinin yanı sıra proje yükleri için yenilikçi ve teknolojik uygulamalar ile nakliye ve montaj hizmetleri sağlayarak sektörde güvenilir bir isim haline gelmiş bulunmaktayız.

Türkiye, Doğu Avrupa ve Orta Doğu bölgesinde güçlü proje referanslarıyla, petrokimya, yenilenebilir enerji, endüstri, tersane ve liman sektörlerine hizmet vermekteyiz. Değerlerimiz arasında iş güvenliğine verdiğimiz önem, iş ortaklarına en iyi çözümleri sunmak, mükemmelliği hedefleme, sürekli gelişime inanmak ve değerlere bağlılık yer almaktadır.

Rüzgar olarak bir şirket için en önemli varlığın insan olduğunun bilincindeyiz. Kıdemli çalışanlarımızın deneyimlerini, endüstrideki son gelişmeler hakkında bilgi sahibi olan yeni jenerasyon bilgisiyle birleştirerek genç, dinamik, güçlü bir ekip ruhu oluşturuyoruz.

Name: Montesp
Description:
A energia que move negócios não é apenas potência, mas propósito e confiança!

Atuando na Grande São Paulo, há 40 anos, transformamos energia em confiança para negócios que não podem parar. A Montesp nasceu da visão de que cada minuto de operação é vital para o sucesso dos nossos clientes, e essa convicção nos tornou uma das referências em soluções energéticas.

Mais que uma fornecedora de geradores e compressores, somos parceiros estratégicos que antecipam necessidades e garantem a continuidade operacional em indústrias, data centers, hospitais e obras que movem o estado de São Paulo. Nossa história é construída sobre o compromisso com a excelência técnica e a certeza de que por trás de cada equipamento existe um negócio que precisa prosperar. E é isso que nos move.
A certeza de que cada projeto merece um olhar único e cada desafio pede uma solução personalizada. Em um mercado onde a confiabilidade é inegociável, nossa equipe respira essa cultura há décadas: são profissionais apaixonados por transformar complexidade em tranquilidade operacional, disponíveis 24 horas por dia para garantir que sua operação continue em movimento. Geramos muito mais que energia - cultivamos relacionamentos duradouros baseados em segurança, inovação e resultados consistentes.

Essa é a energia que nos trouxe até aqui e que nos impulsiona para o futuro. Porque há 40 anos entendemos que nosso trabalho vai muito além de fornecer energia - é sobre manter vivos os sonhos e objetivos de quem confia em nós.

Na Montesp, acreditamos que excelência é alcançada quando tecnologia e humanidade andam lado a lado. Somos mais que energia confiável; somos o motor que sustenta grandes ideias e alimenta o progresso. Se o futuro pede movimento, estamos prontos para mantê-lo ligado.

Montesp – A energia que conecta, transforma e constrói.

Name: Trott'Explore
Description:
Trott’Explore — Les sensations du terroir en Bourgogne

Eddy et Joshua, deux associés passionnés par le terroir et l’aventure, ont décidé de changer d’horizon pour créer Trott’Explore : une expérience inédite qui mêle découverte, sensations et œnotourisme au cœur de la Bourgogne.

 Une expérience unique
	•	Balades de 2 heures en trottinettes électriques tout-terrain, au milieu des vignes de la Côte de Beaune et de la Côte de Nuits.
	•	Accessibles à tous : des parcours adaptés aussi bien aux débutants qu’aux amateurs de sensations.
	•	Guidées ou libres : autonomie totale ou immersion avec un guide passionné qui partage anecdotes et panoramas exclusifs.
	•	Option dégustation : prolongez la découverte avec une dégustation dans l’un de nos domaines partenaires.

 Notre philosophie

Trott’Explore, c’est bien plus qu’une balade :
	•	Lier nature, aventure et vin,
	•	Mettre en avant les producteurs locaux,
	•	Proposer une expérience authentique, fun et écoresponsable.

 Pour qui ?

Entre amis, en famille, en couple ou dans le cadre d’un séminaire d’entreprise, Trott’Explore offre une façon originale et inoubliable de découvrir la Bourgogne. Que vous soyez amateur de vin, passionné de sensations électriques ou simplement curieux, vous repartirez avec des souvenirs uniques et des saveurs locales.

 Découvrez nos offres sur www.trottexplore.com et suivez-nous sur Instagram, Facebook et TikTok pour vivre nos aventures en direct.

CAR NET i #wdrogę

Name: SnapAll

Benvenuto in SnapAll, il tuo personale, intuitivo, e innovativo compagno di cantiere.
Creato da Timelapselab, leader nel monitoraggio dei siti di costruzione a livello globale, con migliaia di dispositivi specializzati installati in tutto il mondo, SnapAll è stato creato per colmare i divari lasciati dalle tradizionali soluzioni per la sorveglianza.
La nostra piattaforma non solo svolge la stessa funzione, ma è potenziata con avanzati algoritmi basati su IA, che monitorano il tuo progetto in ogni minimo dettaglio. Che sia il tracciamento della consegna di nuovi materiali, il conteggio del numero di lavoratori sul luogo, o il rilevamento di potenziali pericoli, gli avvisi in tempo reale di SnapAll ti mantengono al sempre passo. Più che una semplice sorveglianza, SnapAll trasforma dati primari in report facili da leggere, e addirittura, ti permette di creare i tuoi video in timelapse, catturando le parti essenziali del tuo progetto dall’inizio alla fine.
Privacy e sicurezza non sono solo parole chiave per noi; sono incorporate all’interno dei nostri software. La nostra piattaforma è capace in un modo unico di evidenziare equipaggiamenti di sicurezza, come caschi e giubbotti ad alta visibilità, oscurando volti e targhe dei veicoli, mantenendoti conforme al GDPR e alle normative locali per la privacy. 
SnapAll renderà il tuo prossimo progetto non solo più gestibile, ma allo stesso tempo più coinvolgente e protetto. Unisciti a noi in questo viaggio e prendi parte a un futuro dove la gestione dei siti di costruzione non è solo efficiente, ma facile da usare e sicura. Con SnapAll, il tuo cantiere non è soltanto protetto; è una storia che puoi vivere, condividere e celebrare.

Name: RefurbishBike
Description:
We refrain from selling pre-owned bicycles in line with our commitment to the Refurbishbike circular concept, where sustainability takes center stage. Instead, we focus on maintaining and servicing our bikes to extend their lifespan on the road. By upcycling each bike within the program, we estimate a remarkable reduction of 250 kg in carbon footprint per unit, contributing to a greener and more eco-friendly future. 

RefurbishBike forvandler efterladte cykler til grønne urban mobilitetsløsninger til glæde for både private, kommuner, erhverv, events og turister. 
Hvert år efterlades tusinde cykler i cykelstativer og cykelkældre i de danske byer, indtil de bliver indsamlet og sendt til skrot. 
Men der gemmer sig mange gode og brugbare ressourcer blandt disse cykler, og dem har vi hos RefurbishBike derfor specialiseret os i at arbejde med. 
Med fokus på genbrug og genanvendelse går vi de efterladte cykler igennem og sætter dem, vi kan, i stand. Ellers skiller vi dem ad og sorterer delene i henholdsvis affald, reservedele og materialer, der kan genanvendes i andre projekter. F.eks. har vi leveret brugte cykelslanger til et møbelprojekt og bygger til tider også selv ting og sager ud af gamle styr og stel.
Vi tilbyder både at aftage brugte cykler og at levere grønne mobilitetsløsninger til kommuner, boligforeninger, virksomheder, events og private - kontakt os for at høre mere om, hvad vi kan tilbyde lige præcis dig, om du er privat, virksomhed, EVNET, Konference, Hotel m.fl  eller kom forbi vores værksted i Pakhus 77 på havnen ved Aarhus Ø.

I 2023 skal RefurbishBIke leverer cykelflåde til Ocean Race stop over Aarhus, NoRTHSIDE / Tinderbox, VM og DM events, Turisme og konferencer - så der er intet som er for små eller stort, bare tag fat i os - leje@refurbishbike.com
