Die Idee entstand aus der Praxis: Als berufstätiger Vater, Unternehmensberater und Workation-Fan war ich selbst frustriert davon, unterwegs nie so arbeiten zu können wie zuhause. Daraus entstand Case4Work.

At the end, they also have to think about how to dispose of these products, whose most common solution is to throw everything away. Name: DrySource Inc.
Description:
Drysource helps contractors, carriers, consultants design best-in-class drying plans that are backed by science and quantified algorithms. Whether it's equipment, project expertise, or executing the project alongside your team, we ensure property loss is mitigated as efficiently as possible.

With DrySource, clarity rather than confusion is the norm. We deploy proprietary technology and processes whereby we either participate in the design and oversight of a drying plan and/or we review moisture documentation and drying performance to ensure that a consistent, measured and validated service was delivered.

We can evaluate any water loss situation and provide your company with the information to:

- Evaluate exactly what equipment should be deployed in order to achieve the best results to mitigate the loss.

- Design the best drying strategy based on what equipment is available.
 
- Determine with exact precision what the results of any make, model, and style of drying methodology should be.

- Review what scope & strategy was deployed post loss and ensure that the results are legitimate and warranted.

A empresa 3M SILVA LOCADORA oferece uma solução completa em locação de máquinas e caminhões, com uma ampla variedade de equipamentos disponíveis em todo o território nacional. COMO TRABALHAMOS ? 

A 3M SILVA LOCADORA é capaz de oferecer excelentes serviços de aluguel e compra de máquinas e equipamentos graças à sua ampla rede de fornecedores e parceiros em diferentes estados do Brasil. Nossa equipe seleciona cuidadosamente esses fornecedores com base em critérios como qualidade de frota, atendimento técnico, documentações e preços competitivos. Essas informações estão cadastradas em nosso sistema para consultarmos sempre que você, cliente, faz uma solicitação. Assim, podemos apresentar a melhor opção em termos de logística e valores, garantindo a você o MELHOR CUSTO BENEFÍCIO POSSÍVEL. Estamos confiantes de que, ao fazer negócio conosco, nos tornaremos parceiros de longa data, aproveitando os inúmeros benefícios que oferecemos em suas futuras cotações. Portanto, não deixe de considerar a 3M SILVA LOCADORA em suas pesquisas por máquinas e equipamentos de pequeno, médio ou grande porte.

DESEJA REALIZAR UMA COTAÇÃO ? 

Para receber sua cotação, solicitamos que envie um e-mail para comercial@3msilva.com.br com as seguintes informações principais:

- Razão Social :
- Lista dos equipamentos necessários :
- Prazo de locação (Mínimo - 3 meses) :
- Aplicação (Ex: Obras em rodovias) :

GameInvasion is a revolutionary online gaming equipment rental platform designed to provide an immersive experience for gamers worldwide. With a focus on community, technology, and diverse gaming options, GameInvasion aims to be the ultimate destination for gaming enthusiasts of all skill levels.

Our Mission:
At GameInvasion, we aim to democratize access to high-quality gaming equipment. Every gamer, regardless of budget or location, should experience the latest in gaming technology. Our rental model allows gamers to access top-tier equipment without hefty upfront costs.

Key Features:

Extensive Equipment Library:
Variety of Devices: Latest consoles, high-performance PCs, VR headsets, and peripherals.
Newest Releases: Access the latest hardware immediately.

Flexible Rental Plans:
Short-Term and Long-Term: Options for weekend gaming or month-long use.
Affordable Rates: Competitive pricing for great value.
Convenient and Hassle-Free:

Easy Booking: Simple process for browsing, selecting, and renting.
Fast Delivery: Reliable delivery to your doorstep.
Easy Returns: Seamless return process.

Community and Support:
Active Community: Join a vibrant community of gamers.
Expert Support: 24/7 support for all your questions.
User Reviews: Read reviews from fellow gamers.

Advanced Technology:
High-Performance Gear: Top equipment for an unparalleled gaming experience.
Regular Updates: Continuously updated inventory.
Benefits for Gamers:

Access to Premium Gear: Experience top-notch gaming technology without buying.

Try Before You Buy: Rent to see if new gear suits you.
Upgrade Anytime: Flexible plans to stay current with new releases.
Eco-Friendly: Renting supports a sustainable gaming ecosystem.

Why Choose GameInvasion?
Unmatched Variety: Extensive selection ensures you find what you need.
Customer-Centric: Tailored plans and exceptional service prioritize your satisfaction.

For more info, visit our website or connect with us on LinkedIn. Let's game together!

Description:

Name: KDS Direct
Description:
A first in Document Solutions

KDS Direct is the first online store of its kind in South Africa providing you with a platform to purchase or rent office automation solutions for both business and home use.

KDS Direct is part of the First Quantum Holdings Group of companies. Established in 1998, the Group has become the leading supplier of Kyocera Document Solutions and related office automation products in South Africa.

KDS Direct is an extension of the Group’s offerings providing a platform for customers to securely shop online for products from the complete range of Kyocera Document Solution’s printers, multifunction copiers, toners and software.

Kyocera Printers, Multifunction Copiers, Toners and software can all be purchased directly using your preferred payment method or on a rental contract with an optional maintenance agreement or extended warranty.

Total solution

What sets us apart? Only KDS Direct can offer you the benefits of on-line shopping linked to the after sales service and support required to ensure total document satisfaction. Through our highly specialized and professional service team, we not only deliver directly to you, but we also provide installation, training as well as world-class on-site maintenance.

Price Guarantee

What’s more, we guarantee the best price on our products. Simply shop around or get a quote from your existing service provider, then compare the solution you need on our website. If you find any of our products at a lower price elsewhere, not only will we will provide them to you for less, we will also give you the option of choosing between a FREE installation or a FREE 12 months extended warranty on hardware purchased. Guaranteed!

Trust KDS Direct - your online partner in document solutions.

Name: D'Addazio Noleggi s.r.l.
Description:
Fabrizio D'Addazio, amministratore unico della D'ADDAZIO NOLEGGI S.r.l., è presente sul mercato dal 1980, anno in cui avviò l'attività nel settore dell'edilizia come impresa edile artigiana con il nome “D'ADDAZIO FABRIZIO”.

L'intuito e la successiva verifica sul campo della forte richiesta lo ha portato in seguito a diversificare il campo della propria attività verso il servizio di noleggio di macchine aeree e macchine operatrici in genere.

Nel 1998 è stata quindi costituita la ditta “D'ADDAZIO NOLEGGI S.r.l.”, che in pochi anni è riuscita ad acquisire una buona posizione nel mercato del servizio di noleggio, dimostrato dal numero sempre più consistente del parco macchine. Oggi, infatti, l'azienda è dotata di un parco macchine che comprende tutte le tipologie per qualsiasi tipo di lavoro aereo, sia senza operatore (noleggio a freddo) che con operatore (noleggio a caldo): ciò consente il soddisfacimento di tutte le richieste.
L'azienda si rivolge ad una clientela diversificata: edilizia, industria, enti pubblici, imprese di ogni dimensione, vivaisti, privati in genere.
Il nostro obiettivo principale è quello di soddisfare con la massima professionalità, puntualità e serietà tutte le esigenze dei nostri clienti nel pieno rispetto delle norme di sicurezza.

Il nostro slogan è “IN ALTO CON SICUREZZA”: ci piace andare in alto e siamo consapevoli che più si va in alto più cresce l'esigenza di sicurezza. Ecco perché il nostro impegno è sempre rivolto al miglioramento dell'efficacia e dell'efficienza dell'azienda, ottenuta soprattutto per merito della collaborazione di tutto il personale.

Name: Indy Photo Fun
Description:
Based in Fishers, IN, Indy Photo Fun is a photo booth company that serves weddings, parties, and events. If you love spending time taking selfies and snapshots, renting a photo booth is a party essential. Throughout the evening, you and your guests can make lasting memories filled with fun, joy, and laughter.

Indy Photo Fun is owned and operated by Chase Elliott. An expert in the entertainment industry, he has over 10 years of experience serving weddings and events. Chase has previously worked as a wedding photographer, DJ, and magician, making him a well-rounded pro with all things party-related.

At Indy Photo Fun, you can rent a state-of-the-art photo booth for your wedding reception, corporate event or day-after celebration without breaking the bank. You can choose from three packages, ranging from basic to our 360° Video Booth, to suit your budget and requirements. Each option includes your booth rental, a professional attendant, custom overlays, and selected photo filters. If you require extra coverage, you can add more hours to your package or additional add-ons. Once guests have taken their images, they can share them instantly through AirDrop, text or email.

Book your event today by contacting our team or visitng Indyphotofun.com!

Qui sommes-nous ? 

BENNE RIEFFEL, c'est votre solution de gestion des déchets dans le Gard (30), l'Hérault (34) et leurs environs. 

Entreprise à taille humaine, nous comprenons l’importance d’une gestion efficace des déchets, que vous soyez un professionnel ou un particulier.

Notre engagement est de vous offrir un service flexible et adapté à vos besoins spécifiques, que cela soit pour des chantiers, des travaux de rénovation, l’entretien d’espaces verts, un vide maison ou encore un déménagement.

Benne Rieffel se positionne comme un acteur de référence dans le secteur de la collecte des déchets, avec un large parc de 300 bennes spécialisées elle assure la récupération des déchets sur les chantiers ou les entreprises. Une fois collectés, les déchets sont acheminés vers des centres agréés et triés en vue d’un recyclage optimal. Nous assurons la traçabilité des déchets.

En intégrant des pratiques durables et des solutions de logistiques innovantes Benne Rieffel contribue à une économie circulaire.

Name: CROISIERA
Description:
Une croisière à la voile en Corse ?
Avec un skipper expérimenté, c’est l’assurance de jouir d’une semaine de rêve : le cadre idyllique des criques corses, tous les jours différentes, puisque nous caboterons... l’eau turquoise ou plus foncée, en fonction des fonds marins, que vous pourrez explorer en toute sécurité et tranquillité. Le sable blond ou brun, les petites promenades à terre : tout cela, c’est si vous voulez, quand et comme vous le désirez.
Catamaran ou monocoque, nous vous guiderons dans votre choix, que vous ferez en fonction de vos besoins et de vos goûts. Avitaillement, menus, nous vous initierons à l’art de tout prévoir, tranquillement, notre grande expérience vous permettra de vous reposer sur nous
Nous aimons ce métier passion, qui est celui de vous faire plaisir en vous faisant profiter de cette magnifique région, la Corse, en une approche inhabituelle : par la mer !

Zefirent : Vehicle rental designed for professionals 

At Zefirent, we offer short, medium and long-term rental solutions tailored to the daily challenges faced by professionals in the logistics, hygiene and brewing industries. Specialists for almost 50 years, we are present in France and abroad, so we can be at your side wherever you go. What sets us apart is our tailor-made approach. When you choose Zefirent, you benefit from privileged support and advice in choosing your vehicle, regular maintenance of your fleet, 24/7 assistance, a relay vehicle in case of need, and personalized services to simplify the day-to-day management of your business.

We make it a point of honor to keep pace with developments in the field of energy transition, by integrating more environmentally-friendly vehicles into our fleet.We also offer a range of dedicated services to support you in your energy transition.
Zefirent is part of the Petit Forestier Group ecosystem, a family-run business with over 115 years of history, whose DNA is built on quality of service, technical innovation and continuous improvement of practices to keep pace with changes in our customers' businesses and meet the challenges of sustainability.

Description:
E-bike Rental Puglia è la tua porta d'accesso alle avventure ecologiche e indimenticabili nella meravigliosa terra della Puglia e della Basilicata! Siamo un'azienda dedicata a far vivere esperienze uniche ai nostri clienti, offrendo servizi di noleggio e tour in bicicletta che ti permetteranno di scoprire il fascino autentico della Puglia in modo sostenibile e coinvolgente.

La nostra flotta di e-bike è pronta a portarti alla scoperta di luoghi incantevoli, con 3 modelli touring perfettamente progettati per adattarsi alle tue esigenze di viaggio. Che tu stia cercando una passeggiata tranquilla lungo la costa o un'escursione entusiasmante nell'entroterra, le nostre e-bike ti offrono il massimo comfort e controllo.

Se sei un appassionato di mountain bike, non resterai deluso dalla nostra selezione di 10 mountain bike Lapierre di alta qualità. Oppure con facilità con 4 e-MTB. Preparati a sfidare i sentieri più suggestivi della regione, esplorando la natura selvaggia e le colline pittoresche con il massimo della potenza e della versatilità.

Siamo lieti di offrirti opzioni di noleggio flessibili per soddisfare le tue esigenze. Che tu voglia esplorare per un giorno, immergerti nell'atmosfera per tre giorni o vivere un'esperienza completa di una settimana, le nostre tariffe da listino sono progettate per offrirti un'esperienza di qualità a un prezzo conveniente.

Unisciti a noi per pedalare attraverso vigneti lussureggianti, borghi affascinanti e panorami mozzafiato. Con e-Bike Rental Puglia, non stai solo noleggiando una bicicletta, stai intraprendendo un viaggio di scoperta e avventura. Riscopri la gioia del viaggio su due ruote, in sintonia con la natura e con il cuore pulsante della Puglia.

Name: Brandywine Rentals
Description:
Brandywine Rentals began as an idea in 1995, growing out of Brandywine Companies - a Meinhardt family-owned business with a rich history in Maryland, going back to 1927. With decades of experience in the heavy equipment and trucking industries, it made sense for the third generation of the Meinhardt family to add an equipment rental business to the portfolio.

The rental business started slowly, pulling inventory to serve our neighbors from the family’s used truck and equipment dealership just across Crain Highway. A core team of employees developed over the years as we started renting with just a few excavators, forklifts and manlifts. The company became independent and was rebranded in 2012 to Brandywine Rentals, the company you know today.

Fueled by the demand for equipment in Washington, D.C. and Northern Virginia, the business began to grow quickly. The fourth generation of the Meinhardt family developed a plan to bring new value to their service area. New and late model equipment was pumped into the fleet and a new bar was set for outstanding service.

Brandywine Rentals has embarked on a mission to be the premier rental equipment supplier in Washington, D.C. and its surrounding communities. When you call or drop in on Brandywine Rentals, you can expect a personal greeting from a knowledgeable team member, and each customer’s needs will be handled individually and promptly. A polite and professional driver will deliver exactly the piece of equipment you need to your home or place of business. If service is necessary, you can expect our trained mechanics and technicians to provide you with prompt attention to keep your job running smoothly.

Please visit us in Southern Maryland or speak to one of our rental representatives to see how Brandywine Rentals can meet all your equipment rental needs!

In this way we make it easy for individuals and organizations to wash a bicycle. Because we know from experience that this is quite a job if you want to do it right.

VeloWash works with the most modern technologies to clean your bike in a water-saving, environmentally friendly and thorough way without damaging it. No high-pressure cleaner!

VeloWash helps fleet managers, bicycle parks, event organizations, municipalities and bicycle repairers to keep bicycles clean.

Notre slogan "Matériel Événementiel et Transport Expert : Un Seul Arrêt pour Tout" résume notre engagement envers nos clients. Name: BrandSafway Baltimore/DC
Description:
A leading provider of specialized services to the global industrial, commercial and infrastructure markets, BrandSafway delivers access and scaffolding systems, forming and shoring, industrial services and related solutions to more than 30,000 customers worldwide. BrandSafway was formed when Brand Energy & Infrastructure Services and Safway Group combined in 2017.

Built on a rich history of prime companies and proprietary brands known for safety, innovation and high performance, BrandSafway’s products and services portfolio is the broadest in the industry — allowing us to deliver the most efficient and cost-effective solutions to our customers.

At BrandSafway, we are committed to developing a culture where environmental health and safety are core values, adopted and practiced throughout all levels of the organization. Our commitment to EHS starts at the top with our executive leadership team and cascades throughout our organization to include our entire network of companies, branches, locations and jobsites. Ownership, personal responsibility and the importance of following policies and procedures are consistently communicated across our company. Name: aiR'GO CYCLO
Description:
aiR’GO CYCLO: L’innovation au service de la mobilité pour tous!
Je suis ravie de vous présenter aiR'GO CYCLO, l’entreprise dédiée à la location de vélos adaptés, que je viens de créer à Monts (37), au cœur de la Touraine Val de Loire.
Je crois fermement que le vélo doit être une source de plaisir et de liberté pour tous. C’est pourquoi j’ai sélectionné et propose, avec aiR’GO CYCLO, une gamme de quatre modèles de vélos adaptés, spécialement conçus pour répondre aux besoins des familles, des seniors, des personnes à mobilité réduite, ou en situation de handicap.
Les vélos sont équipés de trois roues pour une stabilité optimale, garantissant ainsi un grand confort et une sécurité maximale lors de chaque sortie. De plus, chaque tricycle est doté d'une assistance électrique, facilitant le pédalage et offrant une expérience de cyclisme agréable et sans trop d’efforts.
Des services sur mesure sur Tours et au-delà:
Via aiR’GO CYCLO, je propose une large gamme de services adaptés à vos besoins, où que vous soyez.
Résident local ou simplement de passage vous pouvez profiter de :
• Location de vélos adaptés avec ou sans accompagnement : Choisissez parmi les différents modèles en fonction de vos préférences et de vos besoins spécifiques, et pour la durée souhaitée (demi-journée ou
journée). Ensemble nous trouverons la formule qui vous convient.
• Livraison personnalisée : Les vélos peuvent être livrés directement à l’endroit de votre choix pour un maximum de commodité.
• Sorties thématiques : Découvrez des circuits à thème, conçus pour vous faire découvrir les merveilles de la région (tels que les bords de Loire ou de Cher, les voies vertes, les sites touristiques), et des circuits
combinés à d'autres activités locales, tout en profitant d'une activité physique adaptée et sécurisée
• Animations et participation à des événements : Participez à des événements culturels ou sportifs, à des animations articulées autour du vélo pour une expérience conviviale et enrichissante.

Name: pddle
Description:
Founded in 2023 in Romania, Pddle is a dynamic and innovative company at the forefront of the water sports industry. We take pride in being the first in our region to develop and introduce the concept of an Autonomous Stand Up Paddleboard (SUP) Rental Locker.

As a small and dedicated team, we are passionate about bringing convenience and accessibility to water sports enthusiasts. Our goal is to simplify the paddleboard rental experience, making it easier for individuals to enjoy the thrill of stand-up paddling on their terms.

At Pddle, we understand the challenges faced by paddleboard enthusiasts, whether it's finding a rental location or dealing with limited operating hours. That's why we've created our autonomous SUP rental lockers. Our cutting-edge technology allows users to rent a paddleboard anytime, effortlessly and without the need for staff assistance.

With our user-friendly interface and secure access controls, customers can reserve and unlock a paddleboard from our locker system with just a few taps on their smartphone. Our lockers are strategically placed in convenient waterfront locations, providing quick access to the beautiful Romanian waterways.

As a young company, we embrace the spirit of innovation and are constantly seeking ways to improve our services. We value the feedback and suggestions of our customers, which helps us shape our offerings to better meet their needs.

Connect with us on LinkedIn to stay updated on Pddle's latest developments, milestones, and partnerships. We encourage engagement from the water sports community, aspiring entrepreneurs, and individuals who share our passion for making paddleboarding more accessible and enjoyable.

Join us on this exciting journey as we continue to revolutionize the way people experience stand-up paddling in Romania. Follow our LinkedIn page to witness Pddle's growth, share your own stories, and be part of the evolution of water sports in our region.

We understand that welding automation and positioning equipment can be expensive and challenging to maintain, especially for small and medium-sized businesses. That is why we offer an affordable and flexible hire service that allows you to access the latest equipment without the high capital expenditure.

Our range of equipment includes welding automation systems, conventional and self-aligning rotators, welding positioners, column and boom manipulators, floor turntables, and other welding automation accessories. We also offer innovative robotic welding solutions such as the CLOOSBOT cobot system, and robotic welding cells.

N&N Plant’s welding automation and positioning equipment hire service is designed to help you increase productivity, improve quality, and reduce costs. Our equipment is easy to operate and can significantly reduce manual labour requirements, increase throughput, and improve weld quality.

Our team of highly trained and experienced professionals is always ready to assist you in selecting the right equipment for your specific needs. We provide comprehensive training, maintenance, and technical support to ensure that you get the most out of our equipment.

At N&N Plant Hire Services Ltd, we are committed to providing our clients with the highest level of service and support. Contact us today to learn more about our equipment hire services and how we can help you with your welding automation and positioning equipment needs.

N&N Plant Hire is part of the Key Plant Automation Group.

APL est composée de techniciens spécialement formés aux essais en charge.

Notre connaissance du matériel nous permet d’intervenir en toute sécurité.

Nous réalisons les essais des visites périodiques ou épreuves des appareils de levage chez nos clients avec les divers organismes de contrôle.

La société se compose de 16 personnes et, selon ses besoins, fait appel à des sous-traitants formés à nos métiers.

Nous disposons de poids lourds équipés de grues, chariots élévateurs, transpalettes électriques, châssis de levage.

Nous disposons également d’une grue de manutention électrique Galizia G 150, et d’une Grue 80 T. pour effectuer des montages et démontages de ponts roulants ainsi que l’installation et le transfert de machines.

Nous mettons à disposition nos charges allant de 20 kg à 300 Tonnes.

Nos moyens et nos compétences nous permettent de réaliser :
- Des essais en charge, des mises à l’épreuve, des levages, des grutages.
- Les vérifications annuelles ou semestrielles des appareils de levage.
- Des interventions lors des premières mises en service.
- Des interventions exceptionnelles réclamant des moyens spécifiques.

Description:
Karavan tutkunlarına unutulmaz seyahat deneyimleri sunan İzmir merkezli karavan kiralama firmamız, 2022 yılında kurulmuştur. Amacımız, müşterilerimize özgürlük dolu bir seyahat deneyimi yaşatmak, doğayla iç içe zaman geçirmelerini sağlamaktır.

Firmamız, yeni nesil tasarıma sahip modern karavan çeşitleriyle, müşterilerimize en güvenli ve rahat seyahat deneyimini sunmayı hedeflemektedir. Karavanlarımız, sürekli bakıma tabi tutulmaktadır ve son teknoloji ekipmanlarla donatılmıştır. Güvenlik ve konfor, bizim önceliğimizdir.

Müşteri memnuniyeti, işimizin temelini oluşturur. Profesyonel ve dostane ekibimiz, seyahat planınızı en iyi şekilde düzenlemenizde size yardımcı olacaktır. Rezervasyon süreciniz kolay ve hızlı bir şekilde gerçekleştirilecek, size en uygun karavanı seçmenizde destek sağlanacaktır.

Misyonumuz, müşterilerimize unutulmaz bir karavan deneyimi sunmakla birlikte, doğayı ve çevreyi koruma konusunda duyarlı bir yaklaşıma sahibiz. Doğal kaynakları koruyarak, sürdürülebilir turizmi destekliyoruz. Ayrıca, müşterilerimize doğayı ve çevreyi koruma konusunda bilinçlendirme faaliyetleri düzenlemekteyiz.

Vizyonumuz ise, karavan tutkunlarına en iyi hizmeti sunarak sektörde lider olmaktır. Yenilikçi ve kaliteli hizmet anlayışımızla, müşteri memnuniyetini her zaman ön planda tutarak, karavan turizmini daha da yaygınlaştırmayı hedefliyoruz.

Bizimle seyahat etmek, özgürlük dolu bir macera için mükemmel bir seçimdir. Doğanın güzelliklerini keşfetmek, yeni yerler keşfetmek ve özgürce seyahat etmek isteyenler için karavan kiralama hizmeti sunmaktan mutluluk duyuyoruz. Siz de hayalinizdeki karavan macerasına bizimle adım atın ve unutulmaz anılar biriktirin.

Name: Bann Hire
Description:
Bann Hire was initially established as a small tool outlet in 2007 at our original site based at Rathriland Street in Banbridge.  With major quarrying and civils contractors operating in the area it become clear from the offset that Banbridge had a gap in the market for a Plant hire company.  With heavy investment coupled with a commitment to providing quality machines at reasonable prices BannHire and sales have become the leading supplier of plant tools and powered access in the Mid Ulster area.  The recent investment see’s our Banbridge depot move to their new premises on the Scarva Road beside Murdock’s Building Supplies. 

Following on from the success of the Banbridge depot Bann Hire decided to open a second depot Based at Portadown to cover the increased demand for quality affordable plant hire.  The Mahon Road depot opened its doors in 2009 and quickly established itself as the No1 rental solution in the Portadown area.  Back in 2009 Northern Ireland was in the middle of a severe recession but Bann Hire seemed to buck the trend and continued to grow steadily and now provide its loyal customers with one of the youngest hire fleets in the industry comprising of powered access up to heights of 80ft, excavators 0.75 ton -21 ton, site dumpers from 1 ton – 10 tons.

In 2013 Bann Hire cast its network further north opening its 3rd depot this time in Co Antrim.  The Moira Road based depot had previously been a hire depot for many years but had lay idle for quite some time.  Having seen a demand for its services from this area it seemed the right decision to venture into this next phase of its growth.   Bann Hire now employ 18 members of staff and their sole aim is to provide a quality service at reasonable prices.  Bann Hire don’t sell on price they just offer a service that’s priceless but affordable.  At Bann Hire ‘what they promise is what they deliver and they sell the problem they solve, not the price it costs.

 Over time, through strategic partnerships (such as the 2015 representation of PRG Alliance in Portugal) and a deepening technical expertise, FX Roadlights evolved into a creative production company offering full-spectrum solutions in lighting, video and effects. 
FX Roadlights

FX Roadlights

At FX Roadlights we believe in combining craftsmanship, innovation and reliability. Our mission is to “create and innovate with maximum quality” — delivering projects that not only meet client briefings, but raise the bar in visual storytelling and technical impact. 
Cutting Edges

We are powered by a dedicated team committed to collaboration: communication, coordination and mutual support are the dynamics through which we overcome challenges and deliver excellent results. Our value system prioritises team satisfaction, because we know brilliant projects stem from brilliant teams. 
FX Roadlights

With a wealth of experience and a robust rental inventory, our clients benefit from both creative ambition and logistical muscle. Whether you’re mounting a stadium tour, launching a new brand campaign, or crafting a broadcast event, FX Roadlights brings together concept-to-delivery services, a seasoned crew, and the latest technologies.

Let us partner with you to amplify your vision — through light, motion, and immersive production that leaves a lasting impression.

Trabajamos en toda España, con respuesta real 24/7, para que cada proyecto ofrezca el nivel de confort que tu cliente final espera.

Nuestro trabajo empieza mucho antes del montaje y termina solo cuando todo funciona como debe. Estudio técnico, instalación, supervisión, SAT y retirada coordinada: cada paso está pensado para que no tengas que preocuparte por nada.

Somos un equipo técnico con años de experiencia en proyectos donde no existe margen de error: festivales, eventos corporativos, carpas, rodajes, ferias, naves industriales y procesos sensibles. Sabemos adaptarnos a cambios de última hora, condiciones exigentes y calendarios tensos sin perder precisión.

Trabajar con Clima Events significa tener un partner que está cuando lo necesitas, que te habla claro y que resuelve.
Por eso tantas productoras, agencias y empresas confían en nosotros temporada tras temporada.

Nuestro propósito: que tu evento o proyecto funcione con total confort climático, desde el minuto cero.

Principales ventajas del alquiler de climatización: 

- Instalamos y ajustamos todo nosotros, sin cargar a tu equipo.
- Respondemos en minutos ante cualquier imprevisto.
- Equipos actualizados y revisados antes de cada servicio.
- Configuración a medida según espacio y potencia disponible.
- Solo pagas por el uso real.
- Nosotros asumimos mantenimiento, almacén y transporte.
- No generas activos ni amortizaciones.
- Gasto operativo claro y fácil de justificar.

Nous proposons des prix accessibles et des offres adaptées aux réalités de chacun, afin de vous permettre d’accéder à du matériel performant sans vider votre portefeuille. Avec nous, économiser devient un plaisir !

 Simplicité et engagement client
S'abonner chez Hopliz, c’est profiter d’une expérience fluide et sans stress, avec des garanties adaptées et un service client à l’écoute, prêt à répondre à vos questions et à vous guider dans vos choix. Avec la location, vous n'avez pas le temps de vous lasser et vous privilégiez l’usage à la possession : que demander de plus ?

En pratique :

1. Vous prenez contact directement avec nous , ou vous choisissez en ligne les objets qui vous plaisent 
2. Vous déterminez ensuite la durée pendant laquelle vous souhaitez profiter de votre sélection. Bonne nouvelle, chez nous, le prix varie selon la durée de votre location : plus longtemps vous louez, plus le prix diminue… 
3. Enfin, nous définissons ensemble la mode de livraison de votre commande. Nous livrons à Charleroi, Mons, Tournai, Namur, Liège, Bruxelles, bref, partout en Belgique !
4. Une fois la location terminée, nous prenons contact avec vous pour organiser le retour des objets ou bien leur remplacement par de nouveaux éléments de décoration. Entre temps, n'hésitez pas à faire un tour sur notre site pour ne rien manquer des nouveautés et pourquoi pas, réservez les pièces qui vous plaisent !

Asian Shipping Corporation, a sister company, has the largest fleet of landing crafts (LCT), tugboats and barges. The close teamwork between the two companies gives RERI easy access in the transport of its rental fleet to and from job-sites all over the 7,100 islands of the Philippines.

Our commitment to excellence drives every aspect of our business, from the quality of our equipment to the level of service we provide.

Our experts work closely with you to assess your needs and recommend the most cost-effective and energy-efficient equipment to match your requirements.

Our meticulously maintained inventory includes air conditioners, heaters, chillers, and ventilation systems, all designed to deliver optimal performance and energy savings. We believe in investing in cutting-edge technology to ensure that your business operates smoothly and efficiently.

Reliable and Timely Service:

Providing grid like electricity in areas where grid power is either unavailable or directly replacing expensive traditional power generation, or unreliable grid power. The HPS consists of a roof or ground mounted solar panels a battery bank to store energy, an integrated backup diesel generator and an inverter to act as an interface between the different inputs providing environmentally friendly power 24/7.  
Other advantages and benefits include
-	Lower fuel usage
-	Reduced carbon emissions
-	Low noise
-	ISC Registered equipment
-	Australian design and manufactured units

Headsetene våre har tre kanaler og god lydkvalitet – slik at gjestene kan velge musikk selv og få en opplevelse tilpasset sin smak. Vi leverer utstyr som er enkelt å sette opp, med alt du trenger inkludert. Vi er også alltid tilgjengelige for å svare på spørsmål, og vi gir oss ikke før du føler deg trygg på gjennomføringen.

Vi holder til i Fredrikstad, men sender utstyr til hele Norge. Målet vårt er å gjøre det enkelt å arrangere en fest folk husker – enten det er i byen, på landet, inne eller ute.

Name: Country True Value Hardware & Rental
Description:
Welcome to Country True Value, the Capital Region's leading provider for all your hardware and equipment rental needs. At Country True Value Hardware and Rental, we take pride in delivering outstanding customer service and high-quality products to meet a wide variety of home improvement needs.
Our mission at Country True Value Hardware & Rental has always been—and will continue to be—customer service. We are dedicated to providing the highest level of service to our customers at all times. Whether you're in the market for a few nuts and bolts or need to rent a bulldozer, our team of trained professionals is ready to assist you. Efficient service combined with quality products makes us a True Value.
Founded in 1978 by three brothers from North Greenbush, NY, Country True Value began with just one store. As our business flourished, we expanded into a larger building on the northern end of Route 4. In 1989, we opened a second store, which remains operational at the opposite end of Route 4. Over the years, we've offered a diverse range of products, including hardware, power equipment, and equipment and tool rentals.
In 2004, we proudly launched our rental department, spearheaded by Anthony, Nick Jr., Mark, and Steve. As we move into the next chapter of our journey, these four dedicated individuals will continue to lead our rental services, ensuring that we meet the evolving needs of our community with the same commitment to excellence that has defined us since our inception.

Name: RNTall
Description:
Do you also find it useless to buy that one thing you're only going to use once? Or did you eventually buy it because you had to but now it's just laying there? Well then, welcome to RNTall!

RNTall is an online sharing platform where individuals can rent their items to and from other individuals in the same neighbourhood. This way, there is no need to buy everything you need to use or you can lend your items to others and make some money from it! 

RNTall is an environmental, economical and social company. How? By sharing few-time used products, less production is necessary resulting in less raw material extraction and less CO2 pollution. By sharing products, you only pay for what you use instead of the product itself or you regain your purchase amount by sharing the product with others for a small price. Sharing products also means that all social classes have access to the use of all sorts of products despite their economic backgrounds resulting in more equality. RNTall therefore proudly supports the SDG's goals set by the United Nations.

Our launch is set for September 1st in Antwerp. Mark your calendars!

Name: Intersport Flumserberg

- 1943 wurde das erste Sportfachgeschäft am Flumserberg, das Sporthaus Gassner eröffnet.
- 1987 Namenswechsel zu INTERSPORT GASSNER.
- 1962 startete Werner Güller als Güller Sport im Tannenheim
- 1982 Übergabe an Remo Kurath. Namenswechsel, neu Sport Tannenheim
- 1996 von Markus Güller käuflich erworben und im November 1996 unter dem Namen INTERSPORT TANNENHEIM neu eröffnet
- 2006, Eröffnung INTERSPORT PRODALP
- 2010 Übernahme INTERSPORT GASSNER und einheitlicher Marktauftritt als INTERSPORT FLUMSERBERG mit drei Standorten
- Herbst 2019, Reduktion und Konzentration auf den Standort Tannenboden Dorf. Neuer Marktauftritt als INTERSPORT FLUMSERBERG - The Original since 1943!
- Herbst 2021, Geschäftsübergabe an Pascal Schumacher & Christian Wildhaber

Name: Zefirent Italia
Description:
Zefirent : Il noleggio di veicoli pensato per i professionisti 

Zefirent offre soluzioni di noleggio a breve, medio e lungo termine, adatte alle sfide quotidiane dei professionisti della logistica, dell'igiene e nel settore beverage. Grazie a un'ampia flotta di veicoli commerciali e al nostro servizio completo integrato, consentiamo ai nostri clienti di rimanere efficienti e di rispettare i nuovi requisiti ambientali. 

Specialisti da quasi 50 anni, siamo presenti in Francia e all'estero, per essere al vostro fianco ovunque andiate. Ciò che ci distingue è il nostro approccio su misura. Quando scegliete Zefirent, beneficiate di un supporto e di una consulenza privilegiati nella scelta del vostro veicolo, di una manutenzione regolare della vostra flotta, di un'assistenza 24 ore su 24, 7 giorni su 7, di un veicolo di riserva se necessario e di servizi personalizzati per semplificare la gestione quotidiana della vostra attività.

Per noi è un punto fondamentale stare al passo con gli sviluppi della transizione energetica, integrando nella nostra flotta veicoli più ecologici. Offriamo inoltre una gamma di servizi dedicati per supportarvi nella vostra transizione energetica. 

Zefirent fa parte dell'ecosistema del Gruppo Petit Forestier, un'azienda a conduzione familiare con oltre 115 anni di storia, il cui DNA comprende la qualità del servizio, l'innovazione tecnica e il miglioramento continuo delle pratiche per stare al passo con i cambiamenti delle attività dei nostri clienti e affrontare le sfide della sostenibilità.

La démocratisation du vélo dans votre entreprise présente de nombreux avantages tant pour l'entreprise que pour les employés.
En encourageant l'utilisation du vélo comme moyen de transport, vous contribuez à réduire l'empreinte carbone de votre entreprise. Le vélo est une option de transport respectueuse de l'environnement, car il n'émet pas de gaz à effet de serre ni de polluants atmosphériques. 
Vous l'aurais compris mettre en place le vélo dans votre entreprise peut être une démarche bénéfique tant sur le plan environnemental que pour la santé et la productivité des employés par exemple 10 kilomètres par jours en voiture c'est 700kg de CO2 à l'année.
Vos collaborateurs arrivent oxygéné, une étude du MEDEF démontre qu'un vélotafeur est 6 à 9 % plus productif.

Mettre une flotte de vélo au sein de son entreprise c'est aussi des avantages fiscaux.
Profitez de 25% sur les frais engagés, le coût réel pour l'entreprise d'un vélo électrique à 79€HT/mois et pris en charge à 100% est de 59€HT.

Name: IKON Technology Finance
Description:
Our focus at ITF is to provide rental asset finance solutions that are tailored to the needs of businesses of all sizes. That's why we offer flexible rental asset finance options that allow you to conserve your cash flow and invest in the equipment you need to grow your business.

- Lets talk Process- 

After you have selected the hardware you require to move your business forward, download, complete and submit the application to us.
Your application gets assessed and we will request the required support documentation from you based on the amount of capital required.
Your supplier submits his quotation to us and once all documentation is received we process your application for an approval.
Once approved, the Supplier will get the green light from us to install your new equipment.
On completion of a successful installation we will finalize the documentation with you.
Documentation gets verified and you receive a call to confirm your total satisfaction with your new equipment.
The supplier then submits his invoice and we make payment the equipment.

- Lets talk benefits -

With asset rentals we facilitate the acquisition of critical business operating equipment so you can preserve your cashflow.
No Deposit or capital expense (CAPEX) is required with rentals and this keeps your working capital intact.
Rentals are off Balance Sheet expenses so it wont affect any financial ratios.
Asset rentals reflects as an operating expense in the Income Statement making it 100% deductible.
VAT is paid monthly and is offset against the business’ VAT charged.
Fixed annual escalations can be used to lower monthly rental amounts to suit historic budget increase patterns.
With rentals you can acquire a wide range of business asset classes and upgrade should the business requirements change.

Olles aastaid korraldanud suure õhinaga kõiksugu sündmusi ning pidusid perekonnale ja sõpradele, sealhulgas aasta jooksul ka kaks pulmapidu, hakkas peas küpsema mõte võtta asi veidi suuremalt ette. Tundes endas energiat ja tahet seda kõike ka teistele pakkuda, saigi loodud ARL Korraldus  
Valin hoolega oma inventari hulka just sellist kraami, mida ise kasutaksin ning kuulan ära kõik soovid, kui on vaja olemasolevale lisaks midagi teistsugust. Teen enda poolt kõik selleks, et just Sinu era- või ettevõtte üritus ülimalt hästi peetud saaks! 
Ronin hea meelega redelitel ja kaunistan peoruumi, vedades lae alla tulesid, katteid jms, müttan metsas, otsides loodusest materjale mida kasutada, teen vajadusel käsitööd, kui õiget asja kaubandusest ei leia ning poleerin iga kui viimse lauanõu läikima, et visuaal saaks laitmatu ning särav. Kuna olen ihult ja hingelt põline hiidlane ning armastus Hiiumaa ning siinse elu vastu on piiritu, siis otsustasingi anda midagi saarele tagasi, aidates oma ideede ja abiga siin peetavaid sündmusi paremaks muuta! 
Seega - kui Sul on mõni tore sündmus tulemas, võta ühendust ja teeme peo ägedalt ära!

Description:
Notre société, située au sud du bassin rennais sur l'axe Rennes-Redon intervient dans toute l'Ille et Vilaine, ainsi que sur la région Bretagne.

Louer un monte-meubles pour vos chantiers, c'est décider de vous simplifier la vie avec efficacité : gain de temps, faciliter toutes vos manutentions de matériaux ou autres en limitant les blessures liées à la fatigue et éviter la dégradation interne des locaux.

Le monte-meubles est la solution pour vous aider à réaliser tous vos chantiers. Un camion disposant d'une plateforme élévatrice pouvant aller jusqu'à 27m (9 étages) et supportant jusqu'à 400kg. Son petit gabarit lui permet de se stationner sur des lieux aux accès délicats.

Un technicien formé à l'utilisation du monte-meubles pour votre chantier s'occupera de tout : l'installation du véhicule et la sécurisation des lieux, la manutention de l'appareil tout au long de votre prestation. Il sera de bon conseil pour le chargement et le déchargement du plateau.

Pour réaliser vos projets, il est parfois nécessaire d'obtenir une autorisation de stationnement, mais là encore, pas d'inquiétude, nous pouvons nous en charger sur demande.

Description:
Shenzhen DaFang Intelligent Technology Co. Our team is from Google, Country Garden, Huawei, Telstra, NYSE and other intelligent equipment leading companies, with innovation and rich experience in equipment manufacturing, engineering, and Digital Image Processing technologies.

The company possesses its independent office, research and development, and production facilities covering an area of approximately 4,500 square meters. Since June 30, 2023, DaFang has nearly 100 employees, over 50% of the company's staff, including its subsidiaries, hold a bachelor's degree or higher. The R&D team accounts for about 50% of the total number of people in the company, including 2 people with doctorate degrees, 8 people with master's degrees, and 39 people with bachelor's degrees. 

DaFang AI has applied for more than 120 patents and been approved for 51 patents, including 2 invention patents and 9 software copyrights. It is China's leading intelligent service provider for building construction.

In terms of market expansion, DaFang has signed partnership agreements with over 10 companies in China, covering 9 provinces and regions and completing construction projects spanning millions of square meters. These products have already been sold in Singapore and Hong Kong, with plans to expand into Australia and Japan in the near future, aiming to offer our construction robot products to more countries.

Name: Le temps d'un fût
Description:
Le Temps d’un fût, c’est l’histoire de trois amis, passionnés de la bière, amoureux des micro-brasseries et de la créativité québécoise dans ce domaine.

Lors de l’organisation de différents événements, nous nous sommes rendu compte que l’accès à des modèles de tireuses à bière performante était très difficile, et que leur mise en place était souvent laborieuse.

Conscients tous les trois des enjeux climatiques et l’importance de réduire les déchets, nous nous sommes questionnés à savoir comment notre entreprise pouvait être écoresponsable.

C’est pourquoi nous avons eu l’idée d’offrir un service de distribution de bière sous forme de fût et de mettre à disposition des éco-CUP afin de réduire au maximum les déchets résultant de la distribution classique.

Nous offrons également de la location mensuel.

 Identify which tools are in demand in their area

Name: Sudbury True Value Rental
Description:
From a “one man show” to a 2nd generation family and friend run business with over 157 combined years of rental industry experience…
 
We opened our first rental store as a Taylor Rental on October 1, 1971. In the beginning it was just our Father, with his two young sons helping out after school and on Saturdays. We quickly outgrew our first store which was located on the Sudbury – Wayland line in a small 2,500 square foot space at 82 Boston Post Road, Sudbury. Seeing the need to expand, and having a growing family with several kids interested in the business, we purchased a property at our current location of 712 Boston Post Road in March of 1973. The property on the lot was demolished and a new 3,200 square foot building was constructed. As the business grew, we added an adjacent garage in 1979, bringing our total space to over 11,000 square feet. This building had a ground level, a full basement, and room to add a 3rd level in the future. Finally, in the summer of 1984, we added the 3rd floor giving us an additional 3,200 square feet. This floor houses our office and a party supply cleaning and storage facility.

In October of 1983, the family run Taylor Rental Corporation was sold to the Stanley Works Corporation. By November, our Father decided it was time to leave the Taylor franchise and we became an independent rental store, going by the name Sudbury Rental Center.

December 1996 saw the retirement of our Father after 25+ years in the rental industry and an additional 20+ years in the hardware business. Since his retirement, his son Richard took over management of the business. Together with his brother Paul, sister Lisa and a dedicated staff of friends, we continue to provide a high level of customer service and quality equipment to the people of this area.

 Engagement Écologique :
Chez Bebevac, nous croyons en des voyages plus durables. En proposant des services de location, nous encourageons la réutilisation du matériel plutôt que son achat, contribuant ainsi à la réduction des déchets. Nous facilitons également l'utilisation de moyens de transport plus écologiques, comme le train, en rendant le voyage plus léger et plus pratique.

Name: Rent PWC
Description:
About Us
Welcome to Rent PWC, the ultimate destination for top-notch jet ski rentals on Lake Minnetonka. While the Rent PWC name has been trusted in our community for years, our stewardship of this beloved business began in the spring of 2021 when Brian Juul and Evan Bittle partnered to refresh and elevate the brand. We introduced new equipment, a streamlined booking system that is more user-friendly, and an enhanced business model to ensure an unmatched experience.

Our Vision
At Rent PWC, our vision is to transform the jetski rental experience in the Lake Minnetonka area for our customers and the residents. We're committed to enhancing the industry's reputation by offering responsible, high-quality rentals and continuously exploring innovative ways to elevate your experience. By focusing on overnight and multiday rentals, we attract responsible renters who appreciate the beauty of our lake. Our goal is to provide exceptional service, build meaningful relationships with our customers, and ensure every jetski adventure is safe and memorable. Together, we're shaping a better way to enjoy Lake Minnetonka.

Personalized Delivery and Pickup
We understand the importance of convenience and flexibility. Our personalized delivery and pickup options ensure you have more time to enjoy the water and less worry about logistics. Whether you prefer your jet ski delivered to your desired location by land or directly on the water, we've got you covered. We also offer trailer pickup at our facility for your convenience.

Multiday and Overnight Rentals
What sets us apart is our exclusive focus on multiday and overnight rentals. We believe immersing yourself in the Lake Minnetonka experience requires more than just a few hours on the water. With our multiday and overnight rental options, you can embrace the tranquility of the lake, uncover hidden gems, and create cherished memories with friends and family.

Name: Weldman Welding Industries Sdn Bhd
Description:
Weldman Welding Industries is a Singapore-based company specializing in the design, development, and manufacturing of inverter welding equipment. Here's a summary of its key services and capabilities:

 Core Services & Offerings
Inverter Welding Machines: Weldman is known for its high-frequency inverter technology, which ensures stable arc performance, reduced spatter, and better weld penetration. These machines are compact, energy-efficient, and portable—ideal for both industrial and mobile welding applications.
Plasma Cutting Equipment: Uses high-velocity ionized gas for clean and quick metal cutting, suitable for industrial fabrication.
Welding Accessories: Supplies essential components like welding guns, electrodes, cables, holders, and clamps for safe and efficient operations.
Calibration & Training: Offers calibration services for welding machines and technical training for customer technicians.

 Manufacturing & Facilities
Weldman operates in-house fabrication centers equipped with CNC machines for sheet metal punching and forming.
It also features advanced testing facilities, including Electro-Magnetic Compatibility (EMC) pre-compliance testing.

Name: Sarah's Hire
Description:
More Than Just Portable Toilet Hire
Different events have different attendance numbers and facility requirements, and we provide accordingly. You’ll find our different options for hire suit events of different formality levels and needs.

For standard short term portable toilet hire, you can hire up to 100 of our portable toilet units. These are your typical single-toilet booths with a toilet and hand sanitiser. They’re suitable for building sites, festivals, carnivals, concerts, and other outdoor sites and events. And what do you need to provide for them? Nothing! As long as you have somewhere to place them, they handle the rest. Our units need to be placed on relatively flat ground near vehicle access; aside from that, they’re self-contained and come stocked. We provide the toilet rolls and hand sanitiser.

For outdoor events where people might need more intricate facilities, we offer our Shepherd’s Hut Luxury Toilet. These are trailers that can comfortably service 250 a day, and they include more spacious facilities for both men and women. These are ideal for outdoor events & festivals where people might need to spend lots of time on their appearance. That includes weddings, music festivals, and upscale occasions. These feature individual cubicles for both sexes as well as a urinal for the gents. They also include good lighting and hot water. These trailers don’t require anything more than a flat surface and a power source to work. If you don’t have a power source readily available, we also have generators for hire!

Lastly, we also have accessible toilets available for hire, which include a shallow incline ramp, plenty of space for both wheelchairs and other adults if needed, and handrails for convenience and comfort.

. Emissions TV, radio et tournages : animations jeux, diffusion au public, direction d'équipe technique.
. Assistance et protection auditive.
Les casques et boîtiers audio multicanaux UHF présentent des caractéristiques techniques particulièrement utiles pour le monde de l'évènementiel :
 - une parfaite qualité de son avec un réglage individuel du volume permettant d'éviter toute nuisance sonore.
 - une portée de diffusion pouvant aller jusqu'à 350 mètres.
 - jusqu'à 25 canaux de diffusion dans un même espace, en simultané.
 - des équipements adaptés pour le confort des professionnels et des utilisateurs.
Nos nouveaux équipements sous forme de boîtiers UHF multicanaux, permettent une utilisation avec tout type de casques ou oreillettes filaires.
Nos boîtiers peuvent également être utilisés pour une émission/réception d'un signal audio sur une portée de 350 mètres vers tout type d'enceintes pré-amplifiées (plus aucun câblage nécessaire, gain en temps de montage, moins de contrainte de sécurité).
Plus de 25 000 casques et boîtiers audios sont disponibles à la location (courte et longue durée) pour des utilisations en intérieur ou en extérieur.

Name: MANASVI HEALTHTECH
Description:
Manasvi Healthtech, based in Mysuru, is a dynamic medical equipment supply and rental company dedicated to revolutionizing healthcare accessibility across the region. Established in 2021, the company has quickly garnered a reputation for reliability, innovation, and customer-centric service in the medical equipment sector. Manasvi Healthtech specializes in sourcing, supplying, and renting a comprehensive range of high-quality medical equipment and hospital furniture to hospitals, clinics, nursing homes, and homecare patients.

At the core of Manasvi Healthtech’s operations is a commitment to bridging the gap between modern healthcare technology and those who need it most—whether institutions or individuals. The company’s product portfolio includes but is not limited to oxygen concentrators, wheelchairs, patient beds, cardiac monitors, ventilators, surgical instruments, and home care essentials. Stringent quality checks, partnerships with leading manufacturers, and continuous product updates ensure that clients receive only the most dependable and advanced solutions.

Understanding the evolving needs of both healthcare providers and patients, Manasvi Healthtech offers flexible rental plans, responsive after-sales support, and personalized consultation to help clients select the best-fit solutions for their requirements and budgets. Leveraging digital platforms, social media, and an informative website, the company streamlines the inquiry-to-delivery process, making it easy for clients to access vital medical equipment swiftly and securely.

With a strong emphasis on ethical business practices, transparent dealings, and rapid response, Manasvi Healthtech has earned the trust of healthcare professionals and families alike. The company’s growth-oriented mindset propels ongoing investment in technology, logistics, and staff expertise, ensuring consistent service excellence. As a forward-thinking enterprise, Manasvi Healthtech continues to expand its offerings and impact.

Location de casques et boitiers de transmissions UHF pour vos évènements. 
Les solutions audios que nous développons, sous formes de casques et boîtiers audio multi canaux UHF, répondent à de très nombreuses utilisations :
. Conférences silencieuses : salons, plénières, sous-commissions,...
. Traductions simultanées (multilangues)
. Visites guidées : usines, musées,...
. Concerts silencieux : grand public, corporate,...
. SILENT DISCO, SILENT PARTY, DJ'SET : soirées dansantes silencieuses
. Cinéma de plein air, Drive in, Projection de manifestations sportives sur grand écran...
. Emissions TV, radio et tournages : animations jeux, diffusion au public, direction d'équipe technique.
. Assistance et protection auditive.
Les casques et boîtiers audio multicanaux UHF présentent des caractéristiques techniques particulièrement utiles pour le monde de l'évènementiel :
 - une parfaite qualité de son avec un réglage individuel du volume permettant d'éviter toute nuisance sonore.
 - une portée de diffusion pouvant aller jusqu'à 350 mètres.
 - jusqu'à 25 canaux de diffusion dans un même espace, en simultané.
 - des équipements adaptés pour le confort des professionnels et des utilisateurs.
Nos nouveaux équipements sous forme de boîtiers UHF multicanaux, permettent une utilisation avec tout type de casques ou oreillettes filaires.
Nos boîtiers peuvent également être utilisés pour une émission/réception d'un signal audio sur une portée de 350 mètres vers tout type d'enceintes pré-amplifiées (plus aucun câblage nécessaire, gain en temps de montage, moins de contrainte de sécurité).
Plus de 25 000 casques et boîtiers audios sont disponibles à la location (courte et longue durée) pour des utilisations en intérieur ou en extérieur.

Name: Just Add Water Kayak Rental
Description:
Welcome to Just Add Water kayak rental! 

We are veteran owned and operated!

We strive to bring you a relaxing and enjoyable kayaking experience! 

how it works: 

you pick a location, date and time. 

we meet you at the drop off location with kayaks, paddles, lifejackets, sunscreen, bug spray and a cooler with ice.  

you bring a friend, a picnic and beverages (alcohol not recommended). 

Paddle out and enjoy your experience! We will pick you up when you're done, and have cold water waiting for you!

While an enjoyable float is our goal, safety is our priority! 

Safety Tips

Don't mix any substances and kayaking.  You need to be able to maintain full control of the kayak for the duration of your adventure! 

Prepare yourself for your kayak experience by being properly hydrated.  Increase your water intake the day before your trip.  

Do not tamper with safety features on the kayaks. You don't want to find yourself up a creek without a literal paddle.  

We will provide water resistant floating pouches for your phone just in case you need to call for help!

We work with courier companies, logistics providers, rideshare drivers, and corporate fleets, helping them cut fuel costs, reduce emissions, and meet sustainability targets without the risks of ownership.

Our innovation goes beyond vehicles:

Charging Infrastructure Hubs – strategically placed in high-density urban areas to support businesses and residents without home charging.

Fleet Electrification Support – expert advice on incentives, infrastructure, and operational savings.

Scalable Solutions – from short-term rentals to multi-client EV depots designed for future growth.

With operations expanding into Calgary, Saskatoon, and Winnipeg, Award Evolution is positioned to become the go-to EV fleet partner across the Prairies.

We’re not just proving EVs work in Canada’s toughest winters—we’re proving they make business sense year-round.

Əsas prinsipimiz:
Müştərilərimizə hər zaman keyfiyyətli, sürətli və etibarlı xidmət göstərmək əsas prinsipimizdir. Geniş dəstəyimiz sayəsində, biznes tərəfdaşlarımızın ehtiyaclarına cavab verən həllər təmin edərək, yüksək müştəri məmnuniyyəti və öhdəliyi təmin edirik
Xüsusi avadanlıqların xidmətinə ehtiyac duyulduqda.
Çox vaxt müəssisələrdə və müxtəlif fəaliyyət göstərən şirkətlərdə xüsusi avadanlıqların xidmətlərinə ehtiyac duyulur. Müxtəlif tapşırıqların yerinə yetirilməsi üçün xüsusi bir maşın, məsələn, mobil kran, ekskavator, qaldırıcı platforma və s. tələb oluna bilər. Xüsusi avadanlıqların icarəsi hər hansı bir işdə sərfəli bir həll yoludur. Qeyd etmək lazımdır ki, bu cür avadanlıqların saxlanılması, habelə alınması böyük maliyyə xərclərini əhatə edəcəkdir. ARCON technic sayəsində Azərbaycanda xüsusi avadanlıqların kirayəsi mövcuddur və sürətlə popularlaşır. İcarə xüsusiyyətləri bu cür avadanlıqların satın alınması, onun gələcək təmiri, həmçinin zəmanət xidməti kimi əhəmiyyətli dərəcədə qənaət etməyə imkan verir. Şirkətimiz müxtəlif fəaliyyət göstərən müstərilərimizə qazma, yük qaldırma və ya hündürlükdə işlərin icra olunması üçün xüsusi imkan yaradır.

Name: Rento.life
Description:
Excited to share a glimpse into Rento — our IoT-powered, on-demand rental hub designed to solve a surprisingly common urban pain: owning too much, using too little.

Whether it's a vacuum cleaner, induction stove, drill kit, projector, or even a foldable mattress — city renters are forced to spend ₹40,000–₹70,000+ upfront on things they only use a few hours a month. The result? Clutter, underutilized assets, and financial friction.

 Rento flips the model — enabling residents in apartments, PGs, and co-living spaces to access essential items on-demand, via smart, app-connected cupboards installed right in their lobbies.

 Built for the modern renter:
 No deposits
 No long-term commitments
 Access, not ownership

From daily appliances to event gear and even emergency kits — Rento is building a new layer of infrastructure for shared urban convenience.

 Our recent research estimates over 90,000+ units are sold daily in Rento’s rental categories — signaling a strong case for a tech-first, sustainable rental model.

If you’re building in shared economy, proptech, or urban mobility — I’d love to connect and collaborate.

#SmartLiving #UrbanTech #SharedEconomy #IoT #StartupIndia #Rento #OrbsDio #ProductDesign #Proptech #MobilityInfrastructure

Name: Noor Lifters Private Limited
Description:
The company began serving the industry in 1990 with a single 3-ton forklift. Thanks to our commitment to excellent service around the clock, teamwork, and the support of our clients, we have grown significantly. Today, we operate across India with over 137 pieces of equipment on various projects.
We are now a leading and regular supplier of boom lifts, cranes, forklifts, rough terrain cranes, truck boom lifts, and earth-moving machinery for both hire and sale. We serve India's private and public sectors, as well as multinational corporations operating in the country.

Boom Lifts
Our fleet includes a wide range of boom lifts with impressive reach heights ranging from 60 feet to 185 feet. We offer both telescopic and articulated boom lifts, manufactured by leading brands such as JLG ULTRA Series, Genie Terex, Grove Man Lift, and Haulotte.

Cranes & Crawler Cranes
We offer a diverse selection of cranes, including telescopic cranes, truck cranes, and crawler cranes with capacities ranging from 10 tons to 600 tons. Our fleet features top brands like Liebherr, Krupp, Demag, SANY, GROVE, ZOOM LION, XCMG, and Bantam.

Forklifts
NOOR LIFTERS Private Limited is proud to be the first private company in India to offer the largest capacity forklifts for hire, ranging up to 55 tons. Our fleet includes forklifts with capacities from 2 tons to 55 tons, equipped with various attachments such as coil ramps, 360-degree rotating attachments, paper clamp attachments, extra shoes, container handling attachments, and loaded and empty reach stackers. We feature renowned brands including Kalmar, Godrej, Indital, Hyster, Valmet, TCM, Texmaco, Amac, and SCA. We also offer battery-operated forklifts.

Truck Boom Lifts
We offer a diverse range of truck boom lifts with reach heights from 45 feet to 230 feet. Our fleet includes both telescopic and articulated boom lifts from reputable brands such as Ruthmann Steiger, Palfinger, Multitel, CTE, Eicherr, and Bronto.

Name: Fartherapy
Description:
L'Azienda nasce dallo spirito impreditoriale di Arrigo Fanti, un professionista carico di entusiasmo che dopo avere maturato una considerevole esperienza durante vari anni nel settore delle apparecchiature per la fisioterapia, con coraggio e voglia di affrontare nuove sfide, nel 2010, fonda Fartherapy.

Fartherapy è un'azienda in continuo sviluppo che si sta affermando nel mondo del fisionoleggio per garantire ai propri pazienti il massimo recupero possibile delle funzioni lese a seguito di infortuni o malattie degenerative.

Fartherapy opera nell'interesse del paziente, offrendo un servizio che si pone come il più completo e continuativo possibile, un servizio in grado di fornire le migliori apparecchiature per migliorare la mobilità articolare, riprestinare la fisiologia dell'individuo, agevolando in tale modo il suo completo reinserimento nelle attività della vita quotidiana.

Un forte spirito operativo caratterizza Fartherapy, che ogni giorno con entusiasmo lavora per migliorare la qualità della vita dei pazienti che fanno uso delle sue apparecchiature.

Al centro della propria attività Farthrapy pone la persona al fine di realizzare assieme al paziente la più idonea strategia riabilitativa da attuare comodamente al proprio domicilio.

La riabilitazione eseguita nei centri ospedalieri o fisioterapici molto spesso non è suffciente a coprire completamente le esigenze riabilitatitive, Fartherapy è in grado di portare tra le mura domestiche attrezzature specialistiche che aiuteranno il paziente ad integrare il trattamento riabilitativo, facilitando la sua guarigione e il suo reinserimento sociale.

Notre savoir-faire repose sur une sélection minutieuse de lustres et luminaires d'exception. Nous travaillons avec des professionnels exigeants - décorateurs, scénographes, agences événementielles, wedding planeur - qui souhaitent apporter une ambiance unique.

Phôs propose bien plus qu'une simple mise en lumière : nos solutions sont entièrement personnalisables, avec des options de création sur mesure pour répondre parfaitement aux besoins et aux inspirations de nos clients. Que ce soit pour adapter les dimensions d’un lustre, harmoniser les couleurs aux codes d’une marque, ou concevoir une installation spécifique, notre équipe d'experts assure un service précis, de la conception à l'installation.

Nous croyons en l’importance des détails et dans la magie que peut apporter un éclairage bien pensé à un événement. Chez Phôs, chaque projet est une opportunité d'illuminer les moments les plus précieux de manière unique et élégante.

Prêts à sublimer vos espaces avec Phôs ? Contactez-nous pour découvrir comment notre collection de luminaires et nos services d'éclairage peuvent transformer vos projets.

Door het verlengbare werkblad heb je ook nog eens in totaal 2,75 meter aan werkblad tot je beschikking. Geen rommelige noodkeuken met losse onderdelen, maar een complete, stijlvolle oplossing die je bijna gaat missen als je nieuwe keuken af is.

Adapting to Policy and Regulatory Developments:
We stay ahead of the evolving micromobility policy and regulatory landscape in the Netherlands and the European Union. Our team ensures compliance with existing regulations and engages with policymakers to advocate for favorable frameworks that support micromobility growth.

White-Label Solutions for Business Opportunities:
STEP Mobility provides white-label hardware and software solutions, enabling businesses to launch their own micromobility fleets efficiently. Our scalable platform ensures seamless operations, tailored to specific needs, whether it's a transportation service provider, corporate campus, or hospitality establishment.

Data-Driven Optimization:
We leverage advanced technology to gain insights into usage patterns, user behavior, and movement data. This enables continuous refinement of our hardware and software solutions, improving efficiency, safety, and user experience.

Pioneering Micromobility on a Controlled Scale:
We deploy micromobility solutions through small-scale pilot projects, tailoring them to the specific needs of the Netherlands. Working closely with local authorities, we ensure responsible implementation and address community concerns.

Be part of the micromobility movement that is shaping the future of transportation and connect with us to contribute to a greener and smarter future of transportation.

Nos Activités :
Dormir sur un bateau : Passez une nuit (ou plusieurs) sur un bateau et laissez-vous bercer par le calme de la mer. Immergez-vous dans une expérience hors du commun au cœur du port des Minimes de La Rochelle, pour un moment de déconnexion total. Profitez de la vue sur le port et réveillez-vous avec le lever du soleil sur l’horizon marin.
Croisière en catamaran : Embarquez pour une aventure de plusieurs jours sur notre catamaran Fountaine Pajot Isla 40, accompagné de notre skipper expérimenté. Explorez les merveilles de la côte rochelaise, découvrez les îles avoisinantes et profitez d’une expérience de navigation conviviale et sécurisée. Chaque itinéraire est conçu pour vous faire découvrir des paysages et des escales exceptionnelles en toute sérénité.
Location de bateau à moteur : Pour ceux qui souhaitent explorer les eaux de La Rochelle en autonomie, nous proposons des bateaux à moteur adaptés à tous les niveaux. Naviguez à votre rythme, découvrez les côtes, ou même faites escale sur les îles proches. Une journée de liberté totale pour découvrir les trésors cachés de l’océan !
Bouée tractée : Sensations fortes et fous rires garantis avec notre activité de bouée tractée, encadrée par notre moniteur expérimenté. Parfaite pour les amateurs d’adrénaline et les familles à la recherche de fun, cette activité ravira petits et grands !

Name: Spark Consulting
Description:
Nasce la pagina LinkedIn di Spark Consulting
Spark ovvero Scintilla. 
Dal Big Bang ad oggi c'è sempre stata una scintilla all'origine di tutto.
Perché la luce possa esistere è indispensabile che due cariche opposte, una positiva ed una negativa, possano incontrarsi e dare origine ad una scarica elettrica che nasce proprio con una scintilla.
La vita stessa è l'incontro di due poli opposti, uomo e donna.
La luce è fonte di vita e la scintilla è origine di luce.
Quale nome più adatto allora per chi da sempre si occupa di creare soluzioni innovative per i propri clienti?
Spark Consulting è il nuovo modo di comunicare e veicolare le nostre soluzioni attraverso una nuova modalità di incontro e negoziazione tra domanda ed offerta di servizi: il Web con tutti i suoi social e media.
Le persone con la loro professionalità restano fondamentali ma il cambiamento di cui siamo parte non poteva certo lasciarci spettatori ma ne saremo assolutamente protagonisti.
Accompagniamo i nostri clienti nella scelta delle migliori soluzioni di Telecomunicazioni, Energia e Flotta Aziendale per garantire la migliore efficienza e produttività di imprenditori, dipendenti e collaboratori.

Name: Emplato
Description:
La misión de Emplato es ofrecer alternativas innovadoras y ecológicas a los plásticos tradicionales de un solo uso para los servicios de comida para llevar y de reparto. Nuestra misión es salvar el planeta, plato a plato. Nuestros platos y vasos reutilizables son la clave para reducir los plásticos de un solo uso en la industria alimentaria. Nuestros platos están fabricados con materiales de alta calidad, son duraderos, aptos para el lavavajillas y diseñados para soportar los rigores del uso diario. Ofrecemos una gran variedad de tamaños y diseños para satisfacer las necesidades de distintos negocios, desde cafeterías hasta grandes restaurantes y servicios de catering. Nuestros Emplatos pueden reutilizarse hasta 300 veces si se usan correctamente, lo que supone un ahorro de 30 kg de CO2 a lo largo de su ciclo de vida comparando con los envases desechables de espuma de poliestireno o aluminio. Trabajando con nosotros, nuestros socios pueden pasar a un modelo de economía circular, reduciendo significativamente su huella de carbono y contribuyendo a un futuro más ecológico.

The mission of Emplato is to provide innovative and eco-friendly alternatives to traditional single-use plastics for takeaway and delivery services. Our mission is to save the planet, one plate at a time. Our reusable plates and cups are the key to reducing single-use plastics in the food industry. Our plates are made from high-quality materials that are durable, dishwasher safe, and designed to withstand the rigors of daily use. We offer a variety of sizes and designs to meet the needs of different businesses, from cafes to large restaurants and catering services. Our Emplatos can be reused up to 300 times if used correctly saving 30 kg of CO2 over the life cycle compared to disposable Styrofoam or aluminum containers. By partnering with us, businesses can effortlessly transition to a circular economy model, significantly reducing their carbon footprint and contributing to a greener future.

Name: Ohana Rentals
Description:
The Ohana Story: Bringing Offline Connection Back to Campus
Ohana is a student-centered rental service on a mission to transform campus life across Europe. In a world driven by screens and packed schedules, we believe students deserve simple, accessible ways to connect and enjoy campus beyond the classroom.

The Challenge: High-quality sports and outdoor equipment - from volleyball sets to spikeball kits and padel rackets - is often expensive, hard to transport, or unavailable near universities. 

Our Solution: Ohana brings a fully automated rental system to campuses through smart lockers. Students can sign up, rent, and return equipment entirely through our online platform, making access instant, intuitive, and hassle-free.
Our first prototype - an automated surfboard rental at NOVA SBE in Lisbon - already shows how seamless and impactful the system can be.

Built for scalability, Ohana aims to create a Europe-wide network where students can easily access the sports or outdoor equipment they need. For students, this means 24/7 access to high-quality gear at affordable prices. For universities, it offers a zero-effort, high-value service that enhances campus life and is fully managed through Ohana’s automated lockers and digital platform.

Nous sommes fiers de proposer une alternative éco-responsable à l’achat de valises neuves à des professionnels qui interviennent de près ou de loin dans le monde du voyage.

Aujourd’hui il est possible de réserver sur un site de voyage un hôtel ou une voiture. Pourquoi ne pas en faire de même avec la valise ? 
Nous sommes convaincus qu'en proposant des solutions sur-mesure, adaptées aux besoins de vos clients, nous pouvons contribuer à préserver l'environnement tout en offrant une expérience de voyage de qualité.

Chez Khensoo, nous sommes résolus à vous aider à adopter une stratégie RSE. Nos collaborateurs sont des sites d'hébergement, hôtels, Tours Opérateurs, agences de voyage, organisateurs d'événements ou nous travaillons en service marque blanche. Le principe est simple : vos clients réservent des valises sous votre propre marque et vous touchez une commission sur chaque vente réalisée sans avoir à investir dans l'infrastructure. Nous travaillons également avec les CSE en proposant des offres familiales et des packages exclusifs.

Nous désirons participer à la préservation de notre planète en proposant une solution pratique pour réduire notre empreinte carbone durant nos déplacements. Rejoignez-nous pour un avenir plus responsable !

Nos services :

-  Livraison rapide à domicile dans la ville de Toulouse et ses alentours
-  Assurance casse et usure, en cas de pépins avec les valises
- Nettoyage & désinfection
-  12 points de contrôle effectués entre chaque voyage
- Réparation et Reconditionnement en France

At CH-Trailer Rentals, we believe:

    Trailers should be tougher than your to-do list.

Our mission is simple: Make hauling easy, affordable, and maybe even a little fun. We'll even throw in some friendly advice on how not to lose a fridge on the highway (yes, it happens).

 Clean Equipment
 Fair Pricing
 No Hidden Fees
 Lots of Good Vibes

So go ahead, dream big. Move mountains. Build empires. Or just finally clean out that garage. We’ve got your back — and your load — covered.

 Follow us, book a trailer, and haul like a legend.
 CH-Trailer Rentals: Built for heavy loads and heavier laughs.

Business Structure:
CH-Trailer Rental is a legally registered Doing Business As (DBA) under CH-Plastic Welding LLC, a limited liability company organized and existing under the laws of the State of Florida.
